artifacts.abstract_zh: 理解星系的结构和演化越来越受益于将银河系（MW）——研究最充分的恒星系统——置于外部星系的背景下。为了将银河系作为河外星系进行分析，我们使用两种互补方法构建了它的集成光视图：基于APOGEE DR17数据、无选择函数依赖的轨道叠加解构建的复合恒星种群，以及从同一解初始化的流体动力学银河系模拟的完整SKIRT辐射转移建模。在这两种情况下，银河系数据被组装成模拟IFU数据立方体，并使用全光谱拟合（pPXF）进行分析。然而，我们发现，潜在的视线速度分布（LOSVD）比高斯-埃尔米特参数化所能捕捉的更为复杂，这在类似银河系的晚型棒旋星系中很可能是常见的。对于复合种群模拟，我们恢复了主要的大尺度运动学结构，包括与薄盘、厚盘和棒/核球相关的旋转和速度弥散模式，以及平均恒星种群图。已知的盘化学双峰性在[α/M]-[M/H]中无法直接从IFU恢复，无论SSP模板的α分辨率如何，但其类似银河系的空间变化双序列行为在整个盘中得以恢复。广泛的全局恒星形成历史得以再现，尽管由年龄-金属度简并驱动的人为爆发即使在正则化后仍然存在。对于辐射转移模拟，主要运动学图以中等精度恢复，而高阶矩和恒星种群特性仍然难以约束，这主要是由于数据立方体的较低光谱分辨率和较低统计信噪比。这些结果表明，前向全色建模对于高分辨率IFU类观测仍然具有挑战性。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要翻译：前向全色建模对于高分辨率IFU观测仍具挑战性，银河系类棒旋星系的LOSVD比高斯-埃尔米特参数化更复杂。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Parameters adopted to generate the mock IFU datacubes for the eMW models placed at a distance of 72 Mpc. The disc inclination is denoted by i i . Two approaches are used to construct the datacubes: (i) a composite stellar population (CSP) method, in which spectra are built by combining sMILES SSP templates (see Section 2.2 ); and (ii) full radiative-transfer (RT) modelling, in which the panchromatic emission is computed with SKIRT (see Section 2.3 ). For each configuration, the table lists the total number of stellar particles within the IFU field of view of 60 × 60 60\times 60 arcsec, N FOV N_{\mathrm{FOV}} is the number of star particles inside the FOV, and, for the RT runs, the number of photon packets used in the radiative-transfer calculations, N phot N_{\mathrm{phot}} . The SSP column indicates the stellar population model used (sMILES (Knowles et al., 2023 ) or BC03 (Bruzual & Charlot, 2003 ) ), while the spectral resolution and sampling columns report the intrinsic SSP line-spread function (FWHM) and the adopted wavelength sampling relative to the native SSP grid, respectively.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：为置于72 Mpc距离处的eMW模型生成模拟IFU数据立方体所采用的参数。盘倾角记为i。使用两种方法构建数据立方体：(i) 复合恒星种群（CSP）方法，通过组合sMILES SSP模板构建光谱（见第2.2节）；(ii) 全辐射转移（RT）建模，使用SKIRT计算全色发射（见第2.3节）。对于每种配置，表格列出了IFU视场（60×60角秒）内的恒星粒子总数，N_FOV为视场内恒星粒子数，对于RT运行，还列出了辐射转移计算中使用的光子包数量N_phot。SSP列指示所使用的恒星种群模型（sMILES（Knowles等人，2023）或BC03（Bruzual & Charlot，2003）），而光谱分辨率和采样列分别报告了固有SSP线扩展函数（FWHM）和相对于原生SSP网格所采用的光谱采样。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Examples of mock spectra generated using the composite stellar population approach and the radiative-transfer processing of the hydrodynamic simulation. Top panel: spectrum from a randomly selected Voronoi bin in eMW.0074 (CSP, Sect. 2.2 ), shown together with the corresponding pPXF fit and residuals. Middle panel: full SED of the simulated MW obtained from the radiative-transfer calculation (RT, Sect. 2.3.2 ); the wavelength range used for the mock IFU stellar-population analysis is highlighted in black. The filter response functions used to generate mock images (GALEX, SDSS, JWST–NIRCam, JWST–MIRI, and WISE) are displayed at the bottom of this panel. Bottom panel: zoom-in of the middle panel RT-spectrum extracted for the IFU analysis, shown together with the pPXF fit; grey-shaded regions indicate masked emission-line wavelengths.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：使用复合恒星种群方法和流体动力学模拟的辐射转移处理生成的模拟光谱示例。上方面板：来自eMW.0074（CSP，第2.2节）中随机选择的Voronoi bin的光谱，同时显示相应的pPXF拟合和残差。中间面板：从辐射转移计算（RT，第2.3.2节）获得的模拟银河系的全SED；用于模拟IFU恒星种群分析的波长范围以黑色突出显示。用于生成模拟图像（GALEX、SDSS、JWST–NIRCam、JWST–MIRI和WISE）的滤波器响应函数显示在该面板底部。下方面板：中间面板中用于IFU分析的RT光谱的放大图，同时显示pPXF拟合；灰色阴影区域表示被遮蔽的发射线波长。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Synthetic multi-wavelength images of the MW galaxy obtained using SKIRT radiative transfer post-processing of the hydrodynamic simulation started from the orbit superposition solution based on the APOGEE DR 17 data. Left : Composite image combining SDSS optical bands, GALEX far-ultraviolet, and WISE mid-infrared emission, highlighting the stellar continuum, ongoing star formation, and diffuse dust emission. Right: Synthetic observation in JWST-MIRI (1000W) and JWST-NIRCam (444W, 277W) bands, tracing the warm dust component and reprocessed starlight in the infrared regime. High-resolution images in other bands and projections are available at https://cloud.aip.de/index.php/s/PHdB4qip7oooDeH .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：使用SKIRT辐射转移后处理从基于APOGEE DR 17数据的轨道叠加解初始化的流体动力学模拟获得的银河系星系的多波长合成图像。左图：结合SDSS光学波段、GALEX远紫外和WISE中红外发射的合成图像，突出显示恒星连续谱、正在进行的恒星形成和弥漫尘埃发射。右图：JWST-MIRI（1000W）和JWST-NIRCam（444W、277W）波段的合成观测，追踪红外波段中的暖尘埃成分和再处理星光。其他波段和投影的高分辨率图像可在https://cloud.aip.de/index.php/s/PHdB4qip7oooDeH获取。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Deviation of the true LOSVD from the fourth-order G-H expansion fit in the eMW.0070 model. Top-left panel shows the absolute difference between the input LOSVD and its G–H approximation in each Voronoi bin. Bottom-left: histogram indicating the number of Voronoi bins as a function of the computed deviation. Right panels: examples of the true LOSVD and the corresponding G-H fit for three randomly selected Voronoi bins, marked with crosses of the same colour in the top left panel. The figure illustrates a modest deviation of the input LOSVD from the G-H shape, which may give rise to artificial systematic patterns of the LOSVD moments obtained using parametric full-spectrum fitting approaches, which can be misinterpreted, as the ground truth is unknown in real systems. A comparison of the input LOSVD against the G–H fit for other CSP models with different disc and bar orientations is given in Fig. 14 .
figures.caption_zh: 图3：eMW.0070模型中真实LOSVD与四阶G-H展开拟合的偏差。左上方面板显示每个Voronoi bin中输入LOSVD与其G-H近似之间的绝对差异。左下方面板：直方图显示Voronoi bin数量随计算偏差的变化。右侧面板：三个随机选择的Voronoi bin的真实LOSVD和相应G-H拟合示例，在左上方面板中以相同颜色的十字标记。该图说明了输入LOSVD与G-H形状的适度偏差，这可能导致使用参数化全光谱拟合方法获得的LOSVD矩出现人为系统模式，这些模式可能被误解，因为在真实系统中真实情况未知。其他具有不同盘和棒取向的CSP模型的输入LOSVD与G-H拟合的比较见图14。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Comparison of the line-of-sight kinematics in the extragalactic MW model eMW.0070 . The first column shows the pPXF -derived kinematic maps, obtained by fitting the composite stellar populations spectra with a G–H parametrisation of the LOSVD, assuming no regularisation and no bias. The second column presents the corresponding kinematic moments extracted directly from the particle-based LOSVD using an analytic G–H fit. The third column displays the residuals between the pPXF solution and the particle-based G–H moments. The fourth column shows the uncertainties estimated from the scatter among the Monte Carlo realisations.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：河外星系银河系模型eMW.0070中视线运动学的比较。第一列显示pPXF导出的运动学图，通过使用LOSVD的G-H参数化拟合复合恒星种群光谱获得，假设无正则化和无偏差。第二列显示直接从基于粒子的LOSVD使用解析G-H拟合提取的相应运动学矩。第三列显示pPXF解与基于粒子的G-H矩之间的残差。第四列显示根据蒙特卡洛实现之间的散布估计的不确定性。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Same as in 4 but for model eMW.0074 , revealing the edge-on projection with the side-on bar orientation.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：与图4相同，但针对模型eMW.0074，显示边缘投影和侧向棒取向。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Comparison of the stellar populations parameters in the extragalactic MW model eMW.0070 . The first column shows the pPXF -derived age, [ M / H ] [M/H] and [ α / M ] [\alpha/M] maps, obtained by weighting template values by the weights of the solution, assuming no regularisation and no bias. The second column presents the corresponding mean value maps extracted directly from the particle data. The third column displays the residuals between the pPXF solution and the particle-based values. The fourth column shows the uncertainties estimated from the scatter among the Monte Carlo realisations.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：河外星系银河系模型eMW.0070中恒星种群参数的比较。第一列显示pPXF导出的年龄、[M/H]和[α/M]图，通过按解权重加权模板值获得，假设无正则化和无偏差。第二列显示直接从粒子数据提取的相应平均值图。第三列显示pPXF解与基于粒子的值之间的残差。第四列显示根据蒙特卡洛实现之间的散布估计的不确定性。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Same as in 6 but for model eMW.0074 , revealing the edge-on projection with the side-on bar orientation.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：与图6相同，但针对模型eMW.0074，显示边缘投影和侧向棒取向。

title: Interactions in the dark sector: intrinsic entropy couplings
comment: 5 pages, 1 figure, proceedings of the 60th Rencontres de Moriond on Cosmology: Moriond Cosmology 2026
summary: We present a new class of interacting dark sector models in which the intrinsic entropy of a dark matter fluid couples to a scalar field describing dark energy. These interactions are constructed within a covariant Lagrangian framework, including algebraic and derivative entropy couplings, effectively leading to pure momentum exchange in the dark sector. A key feature is that the background cosmology remains unchanged and therefore indistinguishable from $Λ$CDM or uncoupled quintessence. However, at the level of the linear perturbations, the dark matter Euler equation exhibits scale-dependent contributions, while the continuity equation is unmodified. We show that these classes of models are compatible with current CMB constraints and can potentially produce observable signatures in large-scale structure.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一类新的暗区相互作用模型，其中暗物质流体的内禀熵与描述暗能量的标量场耦合，通过代数与导数熵耦合实现暗区纯动量交换，背景宇宙学与ΛCDM或非耦合精质模型无法区分，但在线性扰动层面暗物质欧拉方程出现尺度依赖项，且与当前CMB约束兼容，可能在大尺度结构产生可观测信号。
AI.motivation: 现有暗能量与暗物质相互作用模型通常会影响背景宇宙学演化，与ΛCDM模型产生可区分差异。作者希望构建一类仅在扰动层面产生效应、背景不可区分的相互作用模型，从而探索新的可观测信号来源。
AI.method: 在协变拉格朗日框架下构建相互作用模型，引入代数熵耦合与导数熵耦合，使暗物质内禀熵与暗能量标量场产生耦合，实现暗区纯动量交换而不影响背景演化。
AI.result: 该类模型与当前CMB约束兼容；背景宇宙学与ΛCDM/非耦合精质模型不可区分；线性扰动下暗物质欧拉方程出现尺度依赖项，而连续性方程保持不变；可能在大尺度结构中产生可观测的物理信号。
AI.conclusion: 熵驱动的暗区相互作用模型为研究暗物质与暗能量相互作用提供了新框架，能在不改变背景演化的前提下产生独特的扰动信号，有望通过未来大尺度结构观测检验。

recommendation.reason: 论文主题为暗物质与暗能量的相互作用模型，属于暗物质研究范畴，与用户兴趣画像中的'dark matter'关键词匹配。但用户的核心兴趣集中在引力透镜、JWST观测、星系形成与星际介质等观测与天体物理方向，而本文为纯理论宇宙学模型研究，不涉及用户关注的核心科学问题、方法或数据。无共同作者。

recommendation.method_fit: 低

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一类新的相互作用暗区模型，其中暗物质流体的固有熵与描述暗能量的标量场耦合。这些相互作用是在协变拉格朗日框架内构建的，包括代数和导数熵耦合，有效导致暗区中的纯动量交换。一个关键特征是背景宇宙学保持不变，因此与ΛCDM或非耦合精质模型无法区分。然而，在线性扰动层面，暗物质欧拉方程表现出尺度依赖的贡献，而连续性方程未修改。我们表明，这些模型与当前CMB约束兼容，并可能在大尺度结构中产生可观测的信号。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：熵驱动的暗区相互作用模型为研究暗物质与暗能量相互作用提供了新框架，能在不改变背景演化的前提下产生独特的扰动信号，有望通过未来大尺度结构观测检验。

title: Groups of Dwarf Galaxies in the Local Universe
comment: Accepted for publication in The Astrophysical Journal Supplement Series
summary: We present a systematic search for dwarf-galaxy groups in the local Universe ($z<0.02$), identifying 28 systems containing at least four spectroscopically confirmed members selected from the SDSS and DESI surveys. Group membership is assigned based on projected separation -within 300\,kpc from the most massive galaxy (designated the ``central'') -and a relative line-of-sight velocity difference of less than 200\,km/s. The sample has a median redshift of $z=0.0131$ ($\sim55$\,Mpc) and a median central stellar mass of $1.7\times10^{9}\,M_\odot$, firmly placing these systems in the low-mass regime. In total, 28 groups contain 129 dwarf galaxy members, with a median stellar mass of $1.63\times10^{8}\,M_\odot$. The median $r$-band apparent magnitude of the member dwarfs is 17.38\,mag, slightly fainter than the spectroscopic observation limit of the SDSS main spectroscopic survey. Remarkably, several groups are centered on galaxies with stellar masses as low as $\sim10^{8}\,M_\odot$, comparable to the Fornax dwarf spheroidal, demonstrating that even very faint galaxies can host bound satellite systems. Most groups exhibit low velocity dispersions ($σ_{v}<50$\,km/s), consistent with being gravitationally bound. The inferred dynamical masses span $\sim10^{10}-10^{12}\,M_\odot$, while the corresponding three-dimensional velocity dispersions ($σ_{3D}$) fall between 50 and 100\,\kms, characteristic of dynamically cold, low-mass halos. Our results provide empirical constraints on small-scale structure formation and show strong consistency with predictions from cosmological volume simulations, supporting the picture that dwarf galaxies can serve as central hosts for their own satellite systems embedded within extended dark-matter halos.

AI.tldr: 本文在本地宇宙中系统搜寻到28个矮星系群（共129个矮星系成员），发现即使质量低至约10⁸ M⊙的矮星系也能拥有束缚卫星系统，其动力学特征与宇宙学模拟预测高度一致。
AI.motivation: 矮星系群是连接星系形成小尺度结构与暗物质晕分布的关键环节，但此前缺乏系统的观测样本，尤其是对极低质量中心星系的束缚卫星系统认知不足。
AI.method: 基于SDSS和DESI光谱巡天数据，选择z<0.02的星系，以投影距离<300 kpc、视向速度差<200 km/s为标准，筛选出至少包含4个光谱确认成员的星系群。
AI.result: 获得28个矮星系群，中心星系恒星质量中位数1.7×10⁹ M⊙，成员星系质量中位数1.63×10⁸ M⊙；多数群的速度弥散<50 km/s，动力学质量约10¹⁰-10¹² M⊙；发现中心星系可低至~10⁸ M⊙（与天炉座矮椭球星系相当）。
AI.conclusion: 矮星系可以作为中心宿主拥有自己的卫星系统，嵌入延展的暗物质晕中；观测结果与宇宙学体积模拟预测高度一致，为小尺度结构形成提供了重要的经验约束。

recommendation.reason: 论文主题为本地宇宙矮星系群，与用户Zotero画像中的核心主题（暗物质、强引力透镜、JWST、高红移星系等）重叠度低。用户画像强调强引力透镜、高红移星系、星际介质等，而本文聚焦低红移矮星系群，科学问题和方法差异显著。无核心作者匹配。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们在本地宇宙（z<0.02）中系统搜寻矮星系群，识别出28个包含至少四个光谱确认成员的系统，这些成员选自SDSS和DESI巡天。群成员资格基于投影分离（距最质量星系（称为“中心”）300千秒差距以内）和相对视线速度差小于200公里/秒。样本的中位红移为z=0.0131（约55百万秒差距），中位中心恒星质量为1.7×10^9太阳质量，明确将这些系统置于低质量区域。总共28个群包含129个矮星系成员，中位恒星质量为1.63×10^8太阳质量。成员矮星的中位r波段视星等为17.38等，略暗于SDSS主光谱巡天的光谱观测极限。值得注意的是，几个群的中心星系恒星质量低至约10^8太阳质量，与天炉座矮椭球星系相当，表明即使非常暗弱的星系也能拥有束缚的卫星系统。大多数群表现出低速度弥散（σ_v<50公里/秒），与引力束缚一致。推断的动力学质量范围约为10^10-10^12太阳质量，而相应的三维速度弥散（σ_3D）介于50-100公里/秒之间，是动力学冷、低质量晕的特征。我们的结果为小尺度结构形成提供了经验约束，并与宇宙学体积模拟的预测高度一致，支持矮星系可以作为自身卫星系统的中心宿主并嵌入延展暗物质晕的图景。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的总结：矮星系可以作为中心宿主拥有自己的卫星系统，嵌入延展的暗物质晕中；观测结果与宇宙学体积模拟预测高度一致，为小尺度结构形成提供了重要的经验约束。

title: A Strong Stellar Age-Metallicity Gradient Relation in Nearby Dwarf Galaxies Driven by Stellar Migration and Environmental Quenching
comment: 18 pages, 6 figures and 1 table; accepcted for publication in ApJL
summary:
Stellar metallicity gradients ($
abla[Z/H]$) provide a fossil record of the assembly history of galaxies. We present an analysis of $
abla[Z/H]$ for 90 nearby low-mass galaxies using VLT/MUSE IFU spectroscopy, spanning stellar masses from $10^{6.5}$ to $10^{10} M_\odot$ (median $\sim 10^{8.5} M_\odot$) and significantly extending the mass coverage of existing IFU surveys into the classical dwarf regime. Our primary finding is a robust negative correlation between $
abla[Z/H]$ and light-weighted stellar age ($|r|\gtrsim 0.7$) measured out to $\sim$ 2$	imes$ effective radius: older dwarf galaxies have steeper (more negative) gradients. This holds regardless of stellar mass, structural compactness, or large-scale environment (group/field), and is strongest in the intermediate-mass regime ($8.2\lesssim\log M_\star/M_\odot\lesssim9.0$). The slope of the age-$
abla[Z/H]$ relation is close to that in the FIRE-2 simulations, indicating that stellar radial migration driven by feedback-induced potential fluctuations may be fundamental in dwarf evolution. But this apparent consistency is likely coincidental given the simulations' overly efficient feedback and chemical mixing. On the other hand, the H\,	extsc{i} deficiency parameter, an indicator of past environmental stripping, shows a moderate yet highly significant correlation with $
abla[Z/H]$, second only to stellar age in strength: galaxies with higher H\,	extsc{i} deficiency tend to have more negative gradients, strongly indicating that environment-driven outside-in quenching and the ensuing gradual truncation of metal enrichment re-shape the stellar metallicity distribution. Our analysis suggests that the chemical evolution of dwarf galaxies likely arises from a synergy of feedback-driven dynamical heating and external environmental processing, though only the latter has robust observational support.

AI.tldr: 该研究分析了90个邻近低质量星系的恒星金属丰度梯度，发现其与恒星年龄呈强负相关，且受环境剥离影响，表明反馈驱动的动力学加热和外部环境处理共同塑造了矮星系的化学演化。
AI.motivation: 利用VLT/MUSE IFU光谱数据，将恒星金属丰度梯度的研究扩展至经典矮星系质量范围（10^6.5-10^10 M⊙），填补了此前大样本IFU巡测在低质量端的空白。
AI.method: 基于90个低质量星系的VLT/MUSE积分场光谱数据，测量恒星金属丰度梯度∇[Z/H]，并分析其与恒星年龄、HI缺陷参数、恒星质量、结构致密性及环境的关系，同时与FIRE-2模拟结果对比。
AI.result: 发现∇[Z/H]与光加权恒星年龄存在强负相关（|r|≥0.7），独立于质量、结构及环境；HI缺陷与∇[Z/H]也存在显著相关，仅次于年龄。与FIRE-2模拟斜率接近但可能出于巧合。
AI.conclusion: 矮星系化学演化由反馈驱动的动力学加热与外部环境处理协同作用，但目前仅环境处理获得可靠的观测支持。

recommendation.reason: 论文主题为邻近矮星系的恒星金属丰度梯度，与用户Zotero画像中的核心主题（暗物质、强引力透镜、JWST、尘埃、星际介质等）无直接关联。用户画像高度集中于强引力透镜、高红移星系、尘埃和磁场，而本文研究低质量矮星系、恒星迁移和环境淬灭，科学问题和方法均不匹配。作者列表中无用户核心作者。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 恒星金属丰度梯度（∇[Z/H]）提供了星系组装历史的化石记录。我们利用VLT/MUSE IFU光谱分析了90个邻近低质量星系的∇[Z/H]，其恒星质量范围从10^6.5到10^10 M_⊙（中位数约10^8.5 M_⊙），显著扩展了现有IFU巡天在经典矮星系区域的质量覆盖。我们的主要发现是，在约2倍有效半径内，∇[Z/H]与光加权恒星年龄之间存在稳健的负相关（|r|≳0.7）：较老的矮星系具有更陡（更负）的梯度。这一关系与恒星质量、结构致密性或大尺度环境（群/场）无关，并且在中等质量区间（8.2≲log M_⋆/M_⊙≲9.0）最强。年龄-∇[Z/H]关系的斜率与FIRE-2模拟中的结果接近，表明由反馈引起的势能波动驱动的恒星径向迁移可能在矮星系演化中起基础性作用。然而，考虑到模拟中过于高效的反馈和化学混合，这种表面一致性可能只是巧合。另一方面，HI缺失参数（过去环境剥离的指标）与∇[Z/H]显示出中等但高度显著的相关性，其强度仅次于恒星年龄：HI缺失越高的星系倾向于具有更负的梯度，强烈表明环境驱动的由外向内熄灭以及随之而来的金属增丰逐渐截断重塑了恒星金属丰度分布。我们的分析表明，矮星系的化学演化可能源于反馈驱动的动力学加热与外部环境处理的协同作用，但目前仅有后者获得了可靠的观测支持。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的总结：矮星系化学演化由反馈驱动的动力学加热与外部环境处理协同作用，但目前仅环境处理获得可靠的观测支持。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Global and structural properties of the galaxy sample. Left: Distribution of stellar masses for Filed (purple) and Group (orange) environments. The sample covers a mass range of 10 6.5 ​ – ​ 10 10 ​ M ⊙ 10^{6.5}\text{--}10^{10}\,M_{\odot} . The vertical dashed line marks the median stellar mass of the entire sample ( log ⁡ ( M ⋆ / M ⊙ ) ≈ 8.5 \log(M_{\star}/M_{\odot})\approx 8.5 ). Middle: Stellar mass–metallicity relation (MZR), where each point is color-coded by the effective radius. Circular and square symbols represent star forming and quiescent galaxies, respectively. The green dashed line represents the Local Group dwarf galaxy relation from Kirby et al. ( 2013 ) . Right: Radial profiles of residual light-weighted metallicity ( Δ ​ [Z/H] \Delta\text{[Z/H]} ) as a function of R e R_{e} -normalized major-axis radius. Lines are color-coded by the light-weighted stellar age of the galaxy. The shaded gray region indicates the outer parts of the galaxies ( R > 1.4 ​ R e R>1.4\,R_{e} ). A clear trend is visible where older galaxies (orange/yellow) exhibit steeper negative gradients compared to the flatter or slightly positive profiles of younger systems (purple).
figures.caption_zh: 图1：星系样本的整体和结构性质。左图：场环境（紫色）和群环境（橙色）中恒星质量的分布。样本覆盖质量范围10^6.5–10^10 M_⊙。垂直虚线标记整个样本的恒星质量中位数（log(M_⋆/M_⊙)≈8.5）。中图：恒星质量-金属丰度关系（MZR），每个点按有效半径着色。圆形和方形分别代表恒星形成星系和宁静星系。绿色虚线表示来自Kirby等人（2013）的本地群矮星系关系。右图：残余光加权金属丰度（Δ[Z/H]）随R_e归一化主轴半径的径向轮廓。线条按星系的光加权恒星年龄着色。灰色阴影区域表示星系外部区域（R>1.4 R_e）。可见明显趋势：较老星系（橙色/黄色）表现出更陡的负梯度，而较年轻系统（紫色）的轮廓较平坦或略正。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Correlation between metallicity gradients ( ∇ r [ Z / H ] \nabla_{r}[Z/H] ) and average stellar ages. The top row shows the total sample for light-weighted ages ( log ⁡ Age L ​ [ yr ] \log\mathrm{Age}_{\mathrm{L}}[\mathrm{yr}] , left) and mass-weighted ages ( Age M ​ [ Gyr ] \mathrm{Age}_{\mathrm{M}}[\mathrm{Gyr}] , right). Circles and squares represent group and field galaxies, respectively. The solid red lines and shaded regions denote the best-fit linear relations and their 1 σ \sigma uncertainties. For comparison, we overplot Local Group dwarfs from Taibi et al. ( 2022 ) (grey circles; using t 90 t_{90} and t 50 t_{50} as proxies for Age L \mathrm{Age}_{\mathrm{L}} and Age M \mathrm{Age}_{\mathrm{M}} , respectively), the MaNDala sample (Cano-Díaz et al. , 2025 ) (blue circles), and simulation results from Mercado et al. ( 2021 ) (green dashed line in the mass-weighted panel) and Cardona-Barrero et al. ( 2023 ) (purple shaded region in the mass-weighted panel). The bottom panels show the same correlations subdivided into three stellar mass bins (low-, intermediate-, and high-mass, as defined in the text). Pearson correlation coefficients ( r r ) and best-fit slopes are indicated in each panel. The horizontal dashed lines mark a flat gradient ( ∇ r = 0 \nabla_{r}=0 ). Note that Age L \mathrm{Age}_{\mathrm{L}} is plotted in logarithmic scale while Age M \mathrm{Age}_{\mathrm{M}} is plotted in linear scale (for a direct comparison with Mercado et al. ( 2021 ) ).
figures.caption_zh: 图2：金属丰度梯度（∇_r[Z/H]）与平均恒星年龄的相关性。顶行显示总样本的光加权年龄（log Age_L[yr]，左）和质量加权年龄（Age_M[Gyr]，右）。圆圈和方块分别代表群星系和场星系。实红线及其阴影区域表示最佳拟合线性关系及其1σ不确定性。作为比较，我们叠加了来自Taibi等人（2022）的本地群矮星（灰色圆圈；分别使用t_90和t_50作为Age_L和Age_M的代理）、MaNDala样本（Cano-Díaz等人，2025）（蓝色圆圈），以及来自Mercado等人（2021）（质量加权面板中的绿色虚线）和Cardona-Barrero等人（2023）（质量加权面板中的紫色阴影区域）的模拟结果。底行显示按三个恒星质量区间（低、中、高质量，如文中定义）细分的相同相关性。每个面板中给出了皮尔逊相关系数（r）和最佳拟合斜率。水平虚线标记平坦梯度（∇_r=0）。注意Age_L以对数刻度绘制，而Age_M以线性刻度绘制（以便与Mercado等人（2021）直接比较）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Spearman rank correlation coefficients ( ρ Spearman \rho_{\mathrm{Spearman}} ) between metallicity gradients ( ∇ r [ Z / H ] \nabla_{r}[Z/H] ) and various galaxy properties. The light grey bars represent the direct (zero-order) correlation coefficients, while the dark blue bars indicate the partial correlation coefficients after controlling for galaxy stellar mass ( M ⋆ M_{\star} ). The analyzed properties include stellar mass ( M ⋆ M_{\star} ), H i deficiency parameter ( D ​ e ​ f HI Def_{\mathrm{HI}} ), central stellar mass surface density ( Σ cen \Sigma_{\mathrm{cen}} ), morphological T-type, local projected number density of galaxies ( η k \eta_{k} ), light-weighted stellar age ( log ⁡ ( Age ) \log(\mathrm{Age}) ), and effective radius ( R e R_{e} ). Error bars denote the 1 ​ σ 1\sigma uncertainties estimated via bootstrap resampling. Statistical significance levels based on the full dataset are indicated above the bars: no asterisks for p ≥ 0.05 p\geq 0.05 (not significant), a single asterisk ( ∗ * ) for p < 0.05 p<0.05 , and double asterisks ( ∗ ⁣ ∗ ** ) for p < 0.001 p<0.001 . Notably, stellar age and the H i deficiency parameter maintain statistically significant correlations with the metallicity gradient even after fixing M ⋆ M_{\star} , whereas morphological and structural parameters show negligible and statistically insignificant partial correlations.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：金属丰度梯度（∇_r[Z/H]）与各种星系性质之间的斯皮尔曼等级相关系数（ρ_Spearman）。浅灰色条表示直接（零阶）相关系数，深蓝色条表示在控制星系恒星质量（M_⋆）后的偏相关系数。分析的性质包括恒星质量（M_⋆）、HI缺失参数（Def_HI）、中心恒星质量面密度（Σ_cen）、形态T型、局部投影数密度（η_k）、光加权恒星年龄（log(Age)）和有效半径（R_e）。误差棒表示通过自助重采样估计的1σ不确定性。基于完整数据集的统计显著性水平在条上方标出：无星号表示p≥0.05（不显著），单星号（*）表示p<0.05，双星号（**）表示p<0.001。值得注意的是，即使在固定M_⋆后，恒星年龄和HI缺失参数仍与金属丰度梯度保持统计显著的相关性，而形态和结构参数显示可忽略且统计不显著的偏相关。

title: The gas kinematics in 70 μm dark molecular clumps with ammonia
comment: 15pages, 4 tables, 6 figures. Accepted for publication in A&A
summary: We present the investigation of the gas kinematics and assess the evolutionary stages of dense cores embedded in four infrared dark clouds (IRDCs) using the NH$_3$(1,1) and NH$_3$(2,2) lines obtained from the VLA and GBT observations. There is no 1.3 cm continuum emission counterpart in 1.3 mm continuum emission revealed by the SMA toward these IRDCs. The low production rate $N_{\rm uv} \sim 10^{44}$ s$^{-1}$ of Lyman continuum photons, indicates that the four IRDCs are in very early evolutionary stages, in which free--free emission is still absent. We have identified 61 dense cores at the size scale of $\sim$0.1 pc using the inner satellite groups of NH$_3$(1,1) line. Among them, 38 dense cores exhibit a single velocity component, while 23 dense cores show multiple velocity components. We find that the nonthermal velocity dispersion ($σ_{\mathrm{non}}$) increases with increasing radial distance from the center of dense core within the inner 0.1 pc toward eight dense cores, indicating that the turbulence is likely dissipated toward the center of these dense cores. In addition, two dense cores in AGAL031.024+00.262 and one core in AGAL024.314+00.086 exhibit nearly sonic motions on a small scale of 0.01 pc. The weakening of nonthermal support against gravity suggests that these dense cores are close to gravitational collapse or are already collapsing. Conversely, there are seven dense cores in AGAL031.024+00.262 showing a decrease in $σ_{\mathrm{non}}$ with increasing radial distance from the center. By comparing this trends with the outflow revealed by CO J=2-1 line, we find that these cores are likely associated with embedded star formation activities. Higher angular resolution observations on sub-parsec scales are essential to reveal the transition from thermal to nonthermal-dominated regions, especially in dense cores associated with multiple velocity components.

AI.tldr: 本文利用VLA和GBT对NH₃(1,1)和NH₃(2,2)谱线的观测，研究了四个红外暗云中致密核心的气体运动学与演化阶段。识别出61个约0.1 pc尺度的致密核心，发现湍流在部分核心中心减弱，部分核心接近或已发生引力坍缩，另有一些核心与恒星形成活动相关。
AI.motivation: 红外暗云是研究恒星形成早期阶段的重要场所，但其中致密核心的动力学状态和演化阶段尚不清楚。本文旨在通过氨分子谱线的高分辨率观测，揭示这些核心的气体运动学特征，并评估其演化阶段。
AI.method: 利用VLA和GBT对NH₃(1,1)和NH₃(2,2)谱线进行观测；通过内卫星组识别致密核心；分析非热速度弥散随径向距离的变化趋势；结合CO J=2-1谱线示踪的外流活动进行对比。
AI.result: 识别出61个致密核心，其中38个为单速度成分，23个为多速度成分；8个核心的非热速度弥散随径向距离增加而增大（湍流向中心耗散）；2个核心在0.01 pc尺度上近乎声速运动；7个核心的非热速度弥散随径向距离增加而减小，与CO外流相关。
AI.conclusion: 部分致密核心因非热支撑减弱而接近或已开始引力坍缩；部分核心与嵌入的恒星形成活动相关；未来需要更高分辨率的亚秒差距尺度观测来揭示热支撑与非热支撑主导区域的过渡，尤其是在多速度成分的核心中。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们利用VLA和GBT观测获得的NH₃(1,1)和NH₃(2,2)谱线，研究了嵌入四个红外暗云（IRDCs）中的致密核心的气体运动学，并评估了它们的演化阶段。SMA观测揭示的1.3毫米连续谱发射在这些IRDCs中没有对应的1.3厘米连续谱发射。莱曼连续谱光子的低产生率N_uv ~ 10⁴⁴ s⁻¹表明这四个IRDCs处于非常早期的演化阶段，此时自由-自由发射尚未出现。我们利用NH₃(1,1)谱线的内卫星组识别出61个尺度约为0.1 pc的致密核心。其中，38个致密核心呈现单一速度分量，而23个致密核心显示多个速度分量。我们发现，在八个致密核心中，非热速度弥散（σ_non）在内部0.1 pc范围内随距核心中心径向距离的增加而增加，这表明湍流可能在这些核心中心附近耗散。此外，AGAL031.024+00.262中的两个致密核心和AGAL024.314+00.086中的一个核心在0.01 pc的小尺度上表现出近乎声速的运动。非热支撑对抗引力的减弱表明这些致密核心接近引力坍缩或已经开始坍缩。相反，AGAL031.024+00.262中的七个致密核心显示σ_non随距中心径向距离的增加而减小。通过将此趋势与CO J=2-1谱线揭示的外流进行比较，我们发现这些核心可能与嵌入的恒星形成活动相关。更高角分辨率的亚秒差距尺度观测对于揭示热支撑与非热支撑主导区域之间的转变至关重要，尤其是在与多速度分量相关的致密核心中。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的结论：部分致密核心因非热支撑减弱而接近或已开始引力坍缩；部分核心与嵌入的恒星形成活动相关；未来需要更高分辨率的亚秒差距尺度观测来揭示热支撑与非热支撑主导区域的过渡，尤其是在多速度成分的核心中。

title: Seeing through the dust: Unraveling near-infrared variability in type 2 active galactic nuclei
comment: Accepted for publication in Astronomy and Astrophysics. 17 pages, 18 figures and 3 tables
summary: Near-infrared (NIR) variability studies of active galactic nuclei (AGNs) are still limited, as long-term multiepoch monitoring in the NIR is observationally challenging. The depth, wavelength coverage, and 14-year temporal baseline of UltraVISTA make it one of the few surveys capable of providing a detailed characterization of AGN variability in this regime. We aim to quantify the NIR variability of known AGNs in the COSMOS field and to investigate the physical origin of variability in type 2 AGNs. In particular, we examine how NIR variability can help clarify the discrepancies between optical and X-ray classifications. Using the 14-year multiepoch UltraVISTA DR6 dataset in the YJHKs bands, we constructed calibrated NIR light curves and quantified their variability through a set of metrics. AGN-like stochastic variability was identified by modeling the light curves with a damped random walk (DRW) process. We find that about 7-17% of the 533 type 2 AGNs are variable in the NIR, with variability fractions increasing toward Ks, where the dusty torus dominates the emission. Based on the wavelength dependence of the DRW variability amplitude, we classify variable type 2 AGNs into disk-dominated, torus-dominated, and highly obscured groups. About one third of the X-ray unobscured (XR I) type 2 AGNs are variable in the NIR, consistent with misclassified weak type 1 or true type 2 AGNs. On the other hand, 21.4% (30/140) of the X-ray obscured (XR II) type 2 AGNs show detectable variability in the NIR, most of them only in H or Ks, consistent with obscuration of the bluer (accretion disk) bands. Type 2 AGNs without X-ray counterparts (165) show the smallest fraction (3.6%) of variable objects. NIR variability provides an effective and independent diagnostic for confirming optical classifications and for identifying weak or misclassified type 1 AGNs in deep extragalactic surveys.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用UltraVISTA 14年多历元数据，对COSMOS场中533个2型AGN的近红外变异性进行了量化分析。发现约7-17%的2型AGN在近红外波段表现出变异性，其中K s波段（尘埃环主导）变异性最高。根据变异性振幅的波长依赖性，将变源分为盘主导、环主导和高度遮蔽三类。近红外变异性能有效识别光学分类中遗漏或误分类的弱1型AGN，特别是对X射线未遮蔽的2型AGN（约三分之一有NIR变异性）和X射线遮蔽的2型AGN（21.4%主要在H/Ks波段可变）提供了独立诊断手段。
AI.motivation: 近红外波段AGN变异性研究仍十分有限，因为长时间多历元监测在观测上极具挑战。同时，光学与X射线分类之间存在不一致性，需要新的独立诊断手段来澄清2型AGN的物理起源和分类争议。
AI.method: 利用UltraVISTA DR6数据集（14年、YJHKs波段）构建校准近红外光变曲线，采用阻尼随机游走（DRW）过程建模以识别AGN随机变异性，并基于变异性振幅的波长依赖性对变源进行分类。
AI.result: 约7-17%的533个2型AGN在NIR波段可变，变率比例向Ks波段增加。约1/3的X射线未遮蔽2型AGN在NIR中可变，21.4%的X射线遮蔽2型AGN在NIR中可变（主要在H/Ks），无X射线对应体的2型AGN变率最低（3.6%）。
AI.conclusion: 近红外变异性是确认光学分类、识别深空巡天中弱或误分类1型AGN的有效独立诊断工具，有助于解决光学与X射线分类之间的差异问题。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 近红外（NIR）活动星系核（AGN）的变异性研究仍然有限，因为在该波段进行长期多历元监测在观测上具有挑战性。UltraVISTA的深度、波长覆盖范围和14年的时间基线使其成为少数能够详细描述该波段AGN变异性特征的巡天之一。我们旨在量化COSMOS场中已知AGN的近红外变异性，并探究2型AGN变异性的物理起源。特别地，我们研究了近红外变异性如何有助于澄清光学与X射线分类之间的差异。利用14年多历元UltraVISTA DR6数据集在YJHKs波段，我们构建了校准后的近红外光变曲线，并通过一组指标量化了其变异性。通过使用阻尼随机游走（DRW）过程对光变曲线进行建模，识别出了类似AGN的随机变异性。我们发现，在533个2型AGN中，约有7-17%在近红外波段表现出变异性，且变异性比例向Ks波段增加，在该波段尘埃环主导辐射。基于DRW变异性振幅的波长依赖性，我们将可变的2型AGN分为盘主导、环主导和高度遮蔽三类。约三分之一的X射线未遮蔽（XR I）2型AGN在近红外波段可变，这与被误分类的弱1型或真实2型AGN一致。另一方面，21.4%（30/140）的X射线遮蔽（XR II）2型AGN在近红外波段显示出可检测的变异性，其中大多数仅在H或Ks波段，这与较蓝（吸积盘）波段被遮蔽一致。没有X射线对应体的2型AGN（165个）显示出最小的可变天体比例（3.6%）。近红外变异性为确认光学分类以及识别深空巡天中的弱或误分类1型AGN提供了一种有效且独立的诊断工具。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论为：近红外变异性是确认光学分类、识别深空巡天中弱或误分类1型AGN的有效独立诊断工具，有助于解决光学与X射线分类之间的差异问题。

title: Mapping a Quasar Outflow from Parsec to Kiloparsec Scales: A Combined HST Absorption and VLT Emission Investigation
comment: Accepted for publication in ApJ
summary: Linking nuclear winds to galactic-scale outflows remains a major observational challenge in understanding the multiscale physics of active galactic nuclei feedback. Here we present VLT/KMOS integral-field spectroscopy and SDSS observations of the $z = 0.9655$ quasar PKS J0352$-$0711. Our analysis reveals complex, multi-ionization emission, including a fast, unresolved nuclear wind and a spatially resolved galactic-scale outflow. We integrate the [O III] emission properties with those deduced from the mini-broad-absorption-line outflows detected in HST/COS observations of this quasar. This unique combination of datasets allows us to trace, for the first time, the physical progression of a quasar outflow from $\sim$ 10 pc to 10 kpc. The multiscale kinematics support a unified evolutionary scenario where the inner, constant-velocity ($\sim-3800 \textrm{ km s}^{-1}$) expansion of the wind is traced jointly in absorption ($\sim 9$ pc) and emission ($\gtrsim 40$ pc). As the wind propagates to $\sim$ 500 pc, the intermediate absorption system reveals a deceleration to $\sim-2100 \textrm{ km s}^{-1}$, consistent with mass-loading from the interstellar medium. Finally, our spatially resolved observations capture the gas breaking out of the inner galaxy, in the form of a wide-angle blueshifted outflow expanding beyond 8 kpc, with a velocity of $\sim -1000 \textrm{ km s}^{-1}$. Despite the three orders of magnitude variation in spatial scale, and a factor-of-four deceleration, the momentum fluxes remain consistent within uncertainties across all scales. These results suggest that the distinct outflow components represent the integrated history of a sustained feedback cycle from nuclear to galactic scales.

AI.tldr: 通过VLT/KMOS和SDSS对类星体PKS J0352-0711的观测，首次追踪了从~10 pc到10 kpc的类星体外流物理演化过程，发现多尺度动量通量一致，支持核风到星系尺度外流的统一演化图景。
AI.motivation: 连接核风与星系尺度外流是理解活动星系核反馈多尺度物理的主要观测挑战，目前缺乏从核区到星系尺度的完整示踪。
AI.method: 利用VLT/KMOS积分场光谱和SDSS观测z=0.9655的类星体PKS J0352-0711，结合HST/COS吸收线数据，分析多电离态发射线及吸收线特征，追踪外流从~10 pc到10 kpc的物理演化。
AI.result: 发现多尺度外流：核区未分辨风（~3800 km/s，~9 pc吸收，≥40 pc发射）、中间吸收系统减速至~2100 km/s（~500 pc）、宽角蓝移外流扩展至>8 kpc（~1000 km/s）。尽管空间尺度跨越三个数量级、速度下降约4倍，但动量通量在误差范围内一致。
AI.conclusion: 不同外流成分代表了从核区到星系尺度持续反馈循环的整合历史，支持统一的演化场景。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 将核区风与星系尺度外流联系起来，是理解活动星系核反馈多尺度物理学的主要观测挑战。本文介绍了对红移z=0.9655的类星体PKS J0352−0711进行的VLT/KMOS积分场光谱和SDSS观测。我们的分析揭示了复杂的、多电离态的发射线，包括一个快速的、未分辨的核区风和一个空间分辨的星系尺度外流。我们将[O III]发射特性与HST/COS观测中探测到的微型宽吸收线外流特性相结合。这种独特的数据组合使我们首次能够追踪类星体外流从约10秒差距到10千秒差距的物理演化过程。多尺度运动学支持一个统一的演化场景：内部以恒定速度（约-3800 km/s）膨胀的风，在吸收（约9 pc）和发射（≥40 pc）中同时被追踪。当风传播到约500 pc时，中间吸收系统显示出减速至约-2100 km/s，这与星际介质的质量加载一致。最后，我们的空间分辨观测捕捉到气体从星系内部突破，形成宽角度的蓝移外流，扩展到超过8 kpc，速度约为-1000 km/s。尽管空间尺度跨越三个数量级，速度降低四倍，但动量通量在所有尺度上仍保持一致。这些结果表明，不同的外流成分代表了从核区到星系尺度的持续反馈循环的整合历史。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论为：不同的外流成分代表了从核区到星系尺度持续反馈循环的整合历史，支持统一的演化场景。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: VLT/KMOS spectrum of the [O iii ] region in PKS 0352, extracted from the central 3 × \times 3 spaxels. The top panel shows the observed spectrum in black and the total best-fit BEAT model in red. The power-law continuum (magenta) is fit using the spectral regions marked by the gray bars. The combined H β \beta BLR model is shown in brown. The blue curve represents the systemic core of the NLR emission, while the green and orange curves trace the broad outflowing components. The bottom panel shows the unnormalized fit residual in gray.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：从中心3×3个空间像素提取的PKS 0352中[O III]区域的VLT/KMOS光谱。上方面板显示观测光谱（黑色）和总最佳拟合BEAT模型（红色）。幂律连续谱（品红色）使用灰色条标记的光谱区域进行拟合。组合的Hβ BLR模型显示为棕色。蓝色曲线代表NLR发射的系统核心，而绿色和橙色曲线追踪宽的流出成分。下方面板以灰色显示未归一化的拟合残差。

(b) Emission near systemic velocities with | v | < 200 ​ km s − 1 |v|<200\textrm{ km s}^{-1} . (c) Highly blueshifted gas between − 200 -200 and − 1000 ​ km s − 1 -1000\textrm{ km s}^{-1} . (d) The highest velocity blueshifted emission between − 1000 -1000 and − 1500 ​ km s − 1 -1500\textrm{ km s}^{-1} . The central cross marks the position of the quasar.

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Spatially resolved maps of the two distinct components of the [O iii ] line emission, showing only spaxels with a > 2 ​ σ >2\sigma detection. The left panels show the integrated flux, while the middle and right panels trace the velocity centroid ( v 50 v_{50} ) and line width (FWHM), respectively. Component A (top row) traces the large-scale rotating disk of the host galaxy, while Component B (bottom row) represents the blueshifted outflowing gas. In the middle and right panels of the bottom row, black and red contours indicate regions B1 and B2, respectively, which contain the bulk of the outflowing gas with high blueshifted velocities ( v 50 < − 250 ​ km s − 1 v_{50}<-250\textrm{ km s}^{-1} ). The central black cross marks the location of the quasar and the black circle in the lower-left corner of each panel represents the FWHM of the instrumental PSF.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：[O III]谱线发射的两个不同成分的空间分辨图，仅显示探测信噪比>2σ的空间像素。左面板显示积分通量，中间和右面板分别追踪速度质心（v50）和线宽（FWHM）。成分A（上排）追踪宿主星系的大尺度旋转盘，而成分B（下排）代表蓝移的流出气体。在下排的中间和右面板中，黑色和红色等高线分别指示区域B1和B2，这些区域包含具有高蓝移速度（v50<-250 km/s）的流出气体主体。中心黑色十字标记类星体的位置，每个面板左下角的黑色圆圈代表仪器PSF的FWHM。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Spatially resolved kinematics of the extended [O iii ] emission. Center: Flux map generated by integrating the rest-frame spectrum between 4985 and 4995 Å. This specific wavelength range was chosen to isolate the high-velocity wing of the outflows and the highly-blueshifted narrow feature (see Section VI.2 ). Surrounding panels : Continuum-subtracted spectra (black) and best-fit models (red) for the labeled regions. Spectra are extracted from 2 × 2 2\times 2 spaxel apertures. Unresolved emission from the BLR and Comp. C was subtracted along with the continuum to isolate the spatially resolved systemic (blue) and outflow (green) components. The dashed vertical lines correspond to the centroids of these components in the unresolved nuclear spectrum (Figure 1 ).
figures.caption_zh: 图4：延展[O III]发射的空间分辨运动学。中心：通过积分静止系光谱在4985至4995 Å之间生成的通量图。选择此特定波长范围是为了隔离外流的高速翼和高度蓝移的窄特征（见第六节B部分）。周围面板：标记区域的连续谱扣除光谱（黑色）和最佳拟合模型（红色）。光谱从2×2空间像素孔径中提取。BLR和成分C的未分辨发射与连续谱一起被扣除，以隔离空间分辨的系统成分（蓝色）和流出成分（绿色）。虚线垂直线对应于未分辨核光谱（图1）中这些成分的质心。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Continuum subtracted SDSS spectrum of the [Ne v ] region in PKS 0352. The observed spectrum is shown in black and our best-fit model in red. The blue and green curves trace the systemic and outflowing components, respectively, and show similar kinematics to their [O iii ] counterparts in Figure 1 .
figures.caption_zh: 图5：PKS 0352中[Ne V]区域的连续谱扣除SDSS光谱。观测光谱显示为黑色，最佳拟合模型为红色。蓝色和绿色曲线分别追踪系统成分和流出成分，并显示出与图1中[O III]对应成分相似的运动学特征。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Ratio of the outflow momentum fluxes ( P ˙ out \dot{P}_{\textrm{out}} ) and the radiative momentum flux of the quasar ( P ˙ AGN = L bol / c = 1.8 × 10 36 ​ dyne \dot{P}_{\textrm{AGN}}=L_{\textrm{bol}}/c=1.8\times 10^{36}\textrm{ dyne} ) as a function of outflow velocity. The data points show the outflow measurements across the three different spatial scales, along with the associated uncertainties. The solid and dashed black lines show the theoretical expectation in the case of momentum- and energy-conserving expansions, respectively. Their normalization is based on the innermost outflow S2. We omit Comp. C from this comparison as its velocity and allowed range for P ˙ out / P ˙ AGN \dot{P}_{\textrm{out}}/\dot{P}_{\textrm{AGN}} overlap with S2 (see Table 2 ).
figures.caption_zh: 图6：流出动量通量（Ṗ_out）与类星体辐射动量通量（Ṗ_AGN = L_bol/c = 1.8×10^36 dyne）之比作为流出速度的函数。数据点显示了三个不同空间尺度上的流出测量值及其相关不确定性。实线和虚线黑线分别显示了动量守恒和能量守恒膨胀情况下的理论预期。它们的归一化基于最内层流出S2。我们在此比较中省略了成分C，因为其速度和Ṗ_out/Ṗ_AGN的允许范围与S2重叠（见表2）。

title: The Narrow-Line Seyfert 1 Phenomenon: Accretion State Versus Host Galaxy Properties
comment: 19 pages, 12 figures; submitted to ApJL
summary: The physical origin of the narrow-line Seyfert 1 (NLS1) and broad-line Seyfert 1 (BLS1) dichotomy remains debated, with competing scenarios invoking host-galaxy evolution or intrinsic accretion physics. We analysed host-galaxy properties and AGN luminosities obtained from CIGALE spectral energy distribution fitting for $\sim$12,000 Type 1 AGNs from the Sloan Digital Sky Survey, of which 29\% are NLS1s. Globally, NLS1s have lower virial black hole masses, higher inferred Eddington ratios, lower stellar masses, and higher specific star formation rates than BLS1s. In the FWHM(\Hb)--$L_{\rm AGN}$ plane, the conventional 2000 km s$^{-1}$ boundary is better viewed as an empirical division within a continuous parameter space rather than a physical threshold, with Fe~II tracing the high-accretion end. In a host-matched subsample of 767 NLS1--BLS1 pairs with statistically indistinguishable stellar mass, black hole mass, and redshift, NLS1s still show higher Eddington ratios, stronger Fe~II emission, and bluer optical continua, together with elevated SFR and dust attenuation, suggesting that the NLS1 phenomenon is most naturally associated with a high-accretion state within the continuous distribution of Type 1 AGNs, while host-galaxy gas supply may also play a role in modulating its strength. In this picture, NLS1 and BLS1 classifications reflect different locations within a continuous accretion sequence of the same underlying population rather than two physically disjoint classes.

AI.tldr: 通过对约12,000个Type 1 AGN（其中29%为NLS1）的CIGALE能谱拟合分析，发现NLS1和BLS1并非两种物理上独立的类别，而是同一连续吸积序列中的不同状态。在主机星系匹配样本中，NLS1仍表现出更高的爱丁顿比、更强的Fe II发射和更蓝的光学连续谱，支持NLS1现象与高吸积态相关的观点。
AI.motivation: 澄清窄线Seyfert 1星系(NLS1)与宽线Seyfert 1星系(BLS1)二分法的物理起源，特别是判断这种分类反映的是星系演化差异还是吸积物理的内在区别。
AI.method: 利用CIGALE对SDSS约12,000个Type 1 AGN进行能谱分布拟合，获取星系性质和AGN光度；通过主机星系匹配（匹配恒星质量、黑洞质量和红移）构建767对NLS1-BLS1配对样本进行比较分析。
AI.result: NLS1整体上具有更低的维里黑洞质量、更高的爱丁顿比、更低的恒星质量和更高的比恒星形成率。在主机匹配样本中，NLS1仍保持更高的爱丁顿比、更强的Fe II发射、更蓝的光学连续谱、更高的SFR和尘埃消光。FWHM(Hβ)-L_AGN平面上的2000 km/s边界本质上是连续参数空间的经验划分而非物理阈值。
AI.conclusion: NLS1和BLS1并非两个物理上独立的类别，而是同一底层AGN群体在连续吸积序列中不同位置的体现，其中NLS1对应高吸积态，而宿主星系的气体供应可能对增强该现象起到调节作用。

recommendation.reason: 该论文研究窄线Seyfert 1星系与宽线Seyfert 1星系的二分法，聚焦于AGN吸积态与宿主星系性质，与用户Zotero库中强引力透镜、暗物质、高红移星系、星际介质等核心主题无直接关联。仅‘dust’和‘dust attenuation’两个关键词有微弱匹配，但整体科学问题、方法（CIGALE能谱拟合、SDSS数据）和核心作者均不重叠。
recommendation.topic_fit: 低。用户主要关注强引力透镜、暗物质、高红移星系（如JWST、ALMA观测）、星际介质等，而本文主题为AGN分类与吸积物理，仅尘埃消光有微弱关联。
recommendation.method_fit: 低。用户常用强引力透镜建模、高分辨率干涉观测（ALMA、JWST）等方法，本文采用CIGALE能谱拟合和SDSS光学数据，方法差异大。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 窄线赛弗特1型（NLS1）与宽线赛弗特1型（BLS1）现象的物理起源仍存在争议，竞争性假说涉及宿主星系演化或内在吸积物理。我们分析了来自斯隆数字巡天约12,000个1型活动星系核（其中29%为NLS1）的CIGALE光谱能量分布拟合得到的宿主星系性质和活动星系核光度。总体而言，NLS1比BLS1具有更低的维里黑洞质量、更高的推断爱丁顿比率、更低的恒星质量和更高的比恒星形成率。在FWHM(Hβ)-L_AGN平面中，传统的2000 km/s边界更应被视为连续参数空间内的经验划分而非物理阈值，其中Fe II追踪高吸积端。在一个由767对NLS1-BLS1组成的、恒星质量、黑洞质量和红移统计上不可区分的宿主匹配子样本中，NLS1仍显示出更高的爱丁顿比率、更强的Fe II发射和更蓝的光学连续谱，以及更高的恒星形成率和尘埃消光，这表明NLS1现象最自然地与1型活动星系核连续分布中的高吸积态相关，而宿主星系的气体供应可能对其强度起调节作用。在此图景中，NLS1和BLS1分类反映了同一底层群体在连续吸积序列中的不同位置，而非两个物理上不相关的类别。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，结论为：NLS1和BLS1并非两个物理上独立的类别，而是同一底层活动星系核群体在连续吸积序列中不同位置的体现，其中NLS1对应高吸积态，而宿主星系的气体供应可能对增强该现象起到调节作用。

Black solid contours indicate constant black hole mass, while black dashed contours indicate constant Eddington ratio. The vertical dotted line marks the conventional NLS1/BLS1 division at FWHM ​ ( H ​ β ) = 2000 ​ km ​ s − 1 \mathrm{FWHM}(\mathrm{H}\beta)=2000~\mathrm{km~s^{-1}} . This figure illustrates that the two classes occupy overlapping regions of a continuous parameter space, with no obvious physical discontinuity at the empirical linewidth boundary. Instead, the distribution is more naturally organized by the underlying black hole mass and accretion state traced by the contour families.

title: A HINSA view of cosmic-ray ionization in IC 348 and NGC 1333: evidence for a strong low-energy cosmic-ray disparity
comment: 12pages, 12 figures, A&A accepted
summary: The cosmic-ray ionization rate (CRIR) is one of the fundamental parameters influencing the chemical and dynamical evolution of molecular clouds. Although observations in recent years have revealed high CRIR values in massive star-forming regions and in the vicinity of protostars, the sources and acceleration mechanisms of cosmic rays remain uncertain. In this work, we present our new estimates of CRIR using the H\,{\sc i} narrow self-absorption (HINSA) technique towards two nearby low-mass star-forming clouds, IC~348 and NGC~1333. In both clouds, the CRIR decreases with increasing H$_2$ column density, but IC~348 exhibits values that are roughly an order of magnitude higher than those in NGC~1333. To interpret this contrast, we model the low-energy spectrum of CRs in a finite slab attenuation framework, using additional constraints from the high-energy CR spectrum inferred from Fermi $γ$-ray observations. The best-fit spectra reproduce the observed CRIR profiles and the contrast between IC~348 and NGC~1333 suggests an order of magnitude difference in low-energy CR populations, likely originating from local acceleration sources beyond protostars (e.g., stellar-wind termination shocks), and partly from the same sources responsible for the GeV $γ$-ray excess. Although uncertainties in cloud structure and gas density may affect the absolute CRIR values, they do not erase the pronounced disparity between the two regions.

AI.tldr: 本文利用HINSA技术测量了IC 348和NGC 1333两个低质量恒星形成区的宇宙线电离率，发现IC 348的电离率比NGC 1333高一个数量级，并建立有限平板衰减模型解释这一差异，认为低能宇宙线主要来源于局部加速机制（如星风终止激波），部分与GeV伽马射线过剩同源。
AI.motivation: 宇宙线电离率是影响分子云化学和动力学演化的关键参数，但宇宙线的来源和加速机制仍不确定，尤其在低质量恒星形成区的研究较少。
AI.method: 利用HINSA技术测量两个邻近低质量恒星形成云IC 348和NGC 1333的CRIR；采用有限平板衰减框架建模低能宇宙线谱，并结合Fermi伽马射线观测的高能CR谱进行约束。
AI.result: 两个云中CRIR均随H2柱密度增加而降低；IC 348的CRIR比NGC 1333高约一个数量级；最佳拟合谱成功重现观测CRIR轮廓；两云间的差异源于低能宇宙线群数量相差一个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 低能宇宙线主要来自局部加速源（如星风终止激波），部分与产生GeV伽马射线过剩的源同源；云结构和气体密度的不确定性不影响两区域间的显著差异。

recommendation.reason: 论文主题为低质量恒星形成区的宇宙线电离率，与用户Zotero库中强引力透镜、暗物质、高红移星系等核心主题无直接关联。仅匹配到'molecular'和'fundamental parameters'两个泛关键词，且无核心作者重叠。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 宇宙射线电离率（CRIR）是影响分子云化学和动力学演化的基本参数之一。尽管近年来的观测在大质量恒星形成区域和原恒星附近揭示了高CRIR值，但宇宙射线的来源和加速机制仍不确定。在本工作中，我们利用H I窄自吸收（HINSA）技术，对两个邻近的低质量恒星形成云IC 348和NGC 1333提出了新的CRIR估计。在两个云中，CRIR随H₂柱密度增加而降低，但IC 348的CRIR值比NGC 1333高约一个数量级。为了解释这一差异，我们在有限平板衰减框架内对低能宇宙射线谱进行建模，并利用费米γ射线观测推断的高能宇宙射线谱作为额外约束。最佳拟合谱再现了观测到的CRIR分布，而IC 348与NGC 1333之间的差异表明低能宇宙射线种群存在一个数量级的差异，这很可能源于原恒星之外的局部加速源（例如星风终止激波），部分也与产生GeV γ射线过剩的源同源。尽管云结构和气体密度的不确定性可能影响绝对CRIR值，但它们不会消除两个区域之间的显著差异。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 低能宇宙线主要来自局部加速源（如星风终止激波），部分与产生GeV伽马射线过剩的源同源；云结构和气体密度的不确定性不影响两区域间的显著差异。

title: Cosmological Tensions in a Gauge-Invariant Modified Gravity
summary: In this work, we investigate a gauge-invariant formulation of modified gravity (GIMOG) wherein the gravitational interaction emerges dynamically from a scalar field following a first-order phase transition. This framework offers a unified cosmological history: it naturally generates a pre-inflationary phase, smoothly recovers the standard radiation and matter-dominated eras, and accounts for late-time cosmic acceleration without the need for a cosmological constant or dark energy. We evaluate the phenomenological viability of the model by confronting it with observational data across distinct cosmological epochs. At late times, the model is constrained using Pantheon+ Type Ia supernova data. In the early Universe, we impose bounds from Big Bang Nucleosynthesis (BBN), specifically utilizing the primordial $^{4}\mathrm{He}$ abundance. Our analysis reveals a distinct phenomenological tension: while late-time observations favor a stronger effective gravitational coupling, BBN constraints tightly restrict early-universe deviations from general relativity. We demonstrate that reconciling these constraints requires a smooth time variation of the effective gravitational constant, $G$, establishing a clear theoretical target for future precision cosmological tests.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种规范不变的修正引力理论（GIMOG），其中引力通过标量场的一级相变动态产生，统一了从暴胀前到晚期宇宙加速的整个宇宙演化历史，并发现早期BBN与晚期超新星数据之间存在张力，要求有效引力常数随时间平滑变化。
AI.motivation: 旨在构建一个无需宇宙学常数或暗能量即可统一解释早期暴胀与晚期宇宙加速的规范不变修正引力理论，并检验其观测可行性。
AI.method: 利用Pantheon+ Ia型超新星数据约束晚期宇宙，利用大爆炸核合成（BBN）的⁴He丰度约束早期宇宙，分析有效引力耦合在不同时期的观测限制。

AI.conclusion: 调和这些约束需要有效引力常数G随时间平滑变化，这为未来精密宇宙学检验提供了明确的理论目标。

title: Neutrino Constraints on memory-burdened Primordial Black Holes from Dwarf Spheroidal Galaxies
comment: 23 pages, 18 figures
summary: Dwarf spheroidal galaxies (dSphs) represent prime targets for indirect dark matter (DM) searches due to their substantial DM content and low astrophysical backgrounds. In this work, we conduct a comprehensive search for neutrino signals originating from memory-burdened primordial black holes (PBHs) as DM candidates, utilizing 10 years of publicly available muon-track data from the IceCube Neutrino Observatory. We systematically compile $\mathcal{D}$-factor measurements from four independent literature sources, resulting in a robust sample of 14 dSphs with well-characterized DM distributions. For each dSph, we perform an unbinned maximum-likelihood analysis to evaluate the significance of potential PBH neutrino emission, incorporating $\mathcal{D}$-factor uncertainties through a profile likelihood framework. No significant excess over the background-only hypothesis is detected. Building upon these null results, we derive upper limits on the PBH abundance fraction, assuming a monochromatic mass distribution. Our analysis demonstrates that constraints obtained in the $k=1$ case exhibit significant improvement compared to previous studies, while the $k=2$ case yields less restrictive limits due to limited sensitivity of IceCube in the relevant energy range. Furthermore, our combined analysis of 14 dSphs achieves substantially enhanced sensitivity, as the independent error treatment effectively reduces statistical uncertainties.

AI.tldr: 本文利用IceCube十年中微子数据，对14个矮椭球星系中"记忆负担"原初黑洞的暗物质信号进行搜索，未发现显著超出，并给出了PBH丰度上限约束。
AI.motivation: 矮椭球星系是暗物质搜索的理想目标，而"记忆负担"原初黑洞是一种新型暗物质候选体，目前尚缺乏对其中微子信号的系统搜索。
AI.method: 收集14个dSphs的D因子数据，利用IceCube十年缪子中微子数据，采用非捆绑最大似然分析并结合轮廓似然框架处理D因子不确定性，进行单源和联合统计分析。
AI.result: 未发现显著超出背景的中微子信号；在k=1情形下对PBH丰度上限有显著改进，k=2情形下约束较弱；联合分析显著提升了灵敏度。
AI.conclusion: 基于14个矮椭球星系的联合分析，对"记忆负担"PBH作为暗物质候选体给出了目前最强的中微子约束，但k=2情形仍需更高能量的观测数据。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 矮椭球星系（dSphs）因其丰富的暗物质（DM）含量和低的天体物理背景，成为间接暗物质搜索的主要目标。在本工作中，我们利用IceCube中微子天文台公开的10年缪子径迹数据，对作为暗物质候选体的“记忆负担”原初黑洞（PBHs）产生的中微子信号进行了全面搜索。我们系统整理了来自四个独立文献源的𝒟因子测量结果，最终获得了一个包含14个具有良好暗物质分布特征的矮椭球星系的稳健样本。针对每个矮椭球星系，我们采用无分箱最大似然分析评估潜在PBH中微子发射的显著性，并通过轮廓似然框架纳入𝒟因子不确定性。未检测到超出背景假设的显著过剩。基于这些零结果，我们假设单色质量分布，推导了PBH丰度分数的上限。我们的分析表明，在k=1情形下获得的约束相比以往研究有显著改善，而k=2情形由于IceCube在相关能量范围内的灵敏度有限，给出的限制较弱。此外，我们对14个矮椭球星系的联合分析实现了显著增强的灵敏度，因为独立的误差处理有效降低了统计不确定性。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于14个矮椭球星系的联合分析，对“记忆负担”PBH作为暗物质候选体给出了目前最强的中微子约束，但k=2情形仍需更高能量的观测数据。

title: Probing the fate of large primordial perturbations with exoplanets
comment: 19 pages
summary: We propose ultra-wide-orbit exoplanets as a noval probe of small-scale dark matter objects. These systems are highly sensitive to gravitational perturbations that could be induced by a Galactic population of compact baryon-free dark matter objects -- whether point-like or extended. Focusing on ultra-compact minihalos, which may arise from large primordial perturbations deviating from the canonical scale-invariant power spectrum, we derive new constraints on their injection scale and amplitude. These constraints complement existing dynamical limits and are expected to improve with upcoming exoplanet surveys. Furthermore, the detection of additional loosely bound exoplanets with these surveys could significantly tighten these constraints. Beyond constraints, we also identify characteristic observational signatures in these systems that could help trace a population of dark matter objects. All this strengthens the potential of exoplanetary science to probe the dark universe back to its very primordial properties.

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用超宽轨道系外行星作为探测小尺度暗物质物体的新型探针，通过分析引力扰动对超致密迷你暗晕的注入尺度和振幅给出新约束，并指出未来的系外行星巡天可显著提升这些限制。
AI.motivation: 传统暗物质探测方法对小尺度暗物质结构（如超致密迷你暗晕）的约束能力有限，需要新的探针来填补这一空白。
AI.method: 利用超宽轨道系外行星系统对引力扰动的高度敏感性，分析来自银河系致密无重子暗物质物体（点状或延展状）的引力效应，特别是超致密迷你暗晕的注入尺度和振幅。
AI.result: 推导出对超致密迷你暗晕注入尺度和振幅的新约束，这些约束补充了现有的动力学限制，并预期随未来系外行星巡天而改善。
AI.conclusion: 系外行星科学有望成为探测暗宇宙乃至早期宇宙原初性质的有力工具，通过识别特征性观测信号来追踪暗物质物体群体。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们提出将超宽轨道系外行星作为小尺度暗物质物体的新型探针。这些系统对引力扰动高度敏感，这种扰动可能由银河系中一群致密无重子暗物质物体（无论是点状还是扩展状）引起。我们聚焦于超紧凑迷你晕（可能源于偏离标准标度不变功率谱的大尺度原初扰动），推导了对其注入尺度和振幅的新约束。这些约束补充了现有的动力学限制，并有望随着即将开展的系外行星巡天而得到改进。此外，利用这些巡天探测到更多松散束缚的系外行星，可能会显著加强这些约束。除了约束之外，我们还识别了这些系统中的特征性观测信号，有助于追踪暗物质物体群体。所有这些都增强了系外行星科学探测暗宇宙乃至其原初性质的能力。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，系外行星科学有望成为探测暗宇宙乃至早期宇宙原初性质的有力工具，通过识别特征性观测信号来追踪暗物质物体群体。

title: Optical Variability as a Probe of Hidden Nuclear Activity in Type 2 AGNs
comment: Published in A&A
summary: Optical variability in Type 2 active galactic nuclei (AGNs) is rarely explored because the direct accretion-disk continuum is obscured by circumnuclear dust. Nevertheless, detectable optical variations are present in multi-epoch surveys such as SDSS Stripe~82, indicating that some component of the nuclear emission is observed indirectly, for example through scattering or partial transmission. This study explores whether this variability is statistically connected to spectroscopic parameters of the narrow-line region (NLR), using the ALPAKA catalogue of spectral measurements. A subsample of 412 Type 2 AGNs was assembled by crossmatching SDSS Stripe 82 multi-epoch variability measurements in the $u,g,r,i,z$ bands with the ALPAKA spectroscopic catalogue. Correlations were then computed between the root-mean-square (RMS) variability amplitudes and the corresponding emission-line luminosities, kinematic widths and equivalent widths (EWs). Significant anti-correlations are found between the RMS amplitudes and [O III] 4949, [O III] 5007, [N II] 6548 and [NII] 6584 line luminosities. Velocity dispersions ($σ$) and EWs of forbidden-lines [O III] 5007 and [N II] 6584 also show moderate anti-correlations with RMS. The results demonstrate that even in obscured AGNs, optical variability carries information about the hidden nucleus. The anti-correlation between RMS and line luminosity suggests a connection between accretion stability and ionising output. Anti-correlations between RMS and the [O III] and [N II] velocity dispersions indicate a secondary correlation between optical RMS variability and the integrated kinematic state of the NLR. In addition, the anti-correlation between RMS and EW shows that the EW variations are primarily driven by changes in the continuum level, while the narrow-line flux itself remains effectively constant on the relevant timescales.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过交叉匹配SDSS Stripe 82多历元测光数据与ALPAKA光谱目录，分析了412个II型活动星系核的光学变异性，发现RMS振幅与[O III]、[N II]等窄线区光谱参数存在显著反相关，表明即使在被遮挡的AGN中，光学变化仍携带关于隐藏核的信息。
AI.motivation: II型AGN的光学变化很少被探索，因为其直接吸积盘连续谱被环核尘埃遮挡。然而多历元巡天中仍存在可探测的光学变化，表明核辐射通过散射或部分透射被间接观测到。本研究旨在探究这种变化是否与窄线区光谱参数存在统计关联。
AI.method: 从SDSS Stripe 82多历元u,g,r,i,z波段测光数据与ALPAKA光谱目录的交叉匹配中，筛选出412个II型AGN子样本，计算RMS变化振幅与发射线光度、速度宽度和等效宽度之间的相关性。
AI.result: 发现RMS振幅与[O III] 4949、[O III] 5007、[N II] 6548、[N II] 6584发射线光度之间存在显著反相关；[O III] 5007和[N II] 6584禁线的速度弥散度与等效宽度也与RMS呈中等程度反相关。
AI.conclusion: 即使在 obscured AGN中，光学变化仍携带隐藏核的信息。RMS与发射线光度的反相关表明吸积稳定性与电离输出之间存在关联；RMS与速度弥散度的反相关指示光学RMS变化与窄线区整体动力学状态之间存在次级关联；RMS与等效宽度的反相关表明EW变化主要由连续谱水平变化驱动，窄线流量在相关时间尺度上保持恒定。

recommendation.reason: 该论文研究II型AGN的光学变异性与窄线区光谱参数的关系，主题涉及活动星系核和尘埃遮挡，与用户Zotero画像中的'dust'关键词有部分匹配，但用户的核心兴趣集中在暗物质、强引力透镜、高红移星系、星际介质和磁场等方向，与本文的AGN变异性研究在科学问题和方法上差异较大。用户的核心作者（如Tommaso Treu、M. Dessauges-Zavadsky等）均未出现在本文作者中。因此，整体相关性较低。

recommendation.method_fit: 低。用户常用强引力透镜、ALMA、JWST等观测手段研究星系和暗物质，本文使用SDSS多历元测光和光谱相关性分析，方法不匹配。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 在2型活动星系核（AGN）中，光学变化很少被探索，因为直接的吸积盘连续谱被核周尘埃遮蔽。尽管如此，在多历元巡天（如SDSS Stripe 82）中仍可探测到光学变化，表明核发射的某些成分是通过散射或部分透射间接观测到的。本研究利用ALPAKA光谱测量目录，探讨这种变化是否与窄线区（NLR）的光谱参数存在统计关联。通过将SDSS Stripe 82在u、g、r、i、z波段的多历元变化测量与ALPAKA光谱目录交叉匹配，构建了一个包含412个2型AGN的子样本。随后计算了均方根（RMS）变化幅度与相应发射线光度、运动学宽度和等效宽度（EW）之间的相关性。发现RMS幅度与[O III] 4949、[O III] 5007、[N II] 6548和[N II] 6584谱线光度之间存在显著反相关。禁线[O III] 5007和[N II] 6584的速度弥散度（σ）和EW也与RMS呈中等程度反相关。结果表明，即使在遮蔽的AGN中，光学变化也携带着隐藏核的信息。RMS与谱线光度之间的反相关暗示吸积稳定性与电离输出之间存在联系。RMS与[O III]和[N II]速度弥散度之间的反相关表明光学RMS变化与NLR的整体动力学状态之间存在次级关联。此外，RMS与EW之间的反相关表明，EW变化主要由连续谱水平变化驱动，而窄线流量在相关时间尺度上保持恒定。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的结论：即使在遮蔽的AGN中，光学变化仍携带隐藏核的信息。RMS与发射线光度的反相关表明吸积稳定性与电离输出之间存在关联；RMS与速度弥散度的反相关指示光学RMS变化与窄线区整体动力学状态之间存在次级关联；RMS与等效宽度的反相关表明EW变化主要由连续谱水平变化驱动，窄线流量在相关时间尺度上保持恒定。

Circles denote the median Δ \Delta in each luminosity bin, plotted at the median luminosity. Squares connected by dotted lines indicate the fraction of objects with Δ < 0 \Delta<0 . In the g g , r r , i i , and z z bands this fraction is zero in all bins, demonstrating that the truncation at RMS cor = 0 \mathrm{RMS}_{\mathrm{cor}}=0 does not introduce a luminosity-dependent selection effect.

title: Tomography of the gamma-ray sky from cross-correlation with DESI DR2 and unWISE galaxies
comment: 26 pages, 11+9 figures
summary: We study the origin of extragalactic gamma-ray emission observed by Fermi-LAT, using the cross-correlation of the gamma-ray sky with maps of large-scale structure provided by the DESI and unWISE surveys. Tomographic cross-correlation reveals the bias-weighted redshift distributions of gamma-ray sources. We first illustrate this method by cross-correlating detected gamma-ray point sources with large-scale structure. We find a significant cross-correlation and infer a point source redshift distribution broadly consistent with the distribution of identified optical counterparts previously reported in the literature, as well as a similar linear bias ($b \approx 2$) to massive galaxies that host bright active galactic nuclei. We then study the clustering of the Fermi unresolved gamma-ray background (UGRB), both in auto-correlation and in cross-correlation with large-scale structure. We detect the cross-correlation of the UGRB and LSS at $\sim 10σ$ in total, with highly significant detections from both DESI and unWISE. Our measurements suggest that the redshift distribution of the UGRB is broadly consistent with the redshift distribution of detected point sources. Additionally, we find a relatively weak amplitude for the cross-correlation with large-scale structure at z < 2, suggesting a significant fraction of the UGRB does not come from z < 2 large-scale structure. A natural candidate is contamination of from residual Galactic emission, and our best estimate of the contamination level derived from the UGRB auto-spectrum suggests that the mean bias of UGRB sources is indeed quite similar to the bias of detected Fermi point sources. However, we cannot exclude additional emission from gamma-ray sources at high redshift, z > 2, and we suggest that cross-correlation with tracers at z > 2, including CMB lensing, would be the ideal way to determine the fraction of z > 2 emission.

AI.tldr: 利用Fermi-LAT伽马射线数据与DESI、unWISE大规模结构巡天的层析交叉相关，研究了河外伽马射线背景的来源。发现已探测点源的redshift分布与光学认证的AGN宿主星系一致（偏置b≈2），而未分辨伽马射线背景（UGRB）的交叉相关信号显著（~10σ），但其z<2的幅度较弱，暗示大量UGRB可能来自银河系残余发射或高红移（z>2）源。
AI.motivation: 河外伽马射线背景的起源长期以来存在争议，不清楚主要来自已分辨的点源（如活动星系核）还是未分辨的暗弱源，以及银河系前景污染的贡献有多大。这项研究旨在通过层析交叉相关方法精确刻画伽马射线源的redshift分布和偏置参数，从而揭示其物理起源。
AI.method: 使用Fermi-LAT伽马射线数据与DESI和unWISE的大规模结构巡天进行层析交叉相关分析；分别对已探测到的伽马射线点源和未分辨伽马射线背景（UGRB）进行自相关与交叉相关测量，通过偏置加权的redshift分布推断源的物理性质。
AI.result: 1. 点源交叉相关显著，redshift分布与文献中已知的光学认证AGN宿主星系一致，线性偏置b≈2。2. UGRB与LSS的交叉相关达到~10σ置信度。3. UGRB的redshift分布与点源大致一致，但在z<2的交叉相关幅度较弱，表明大量UGRB并非来自z<2的大尺度结构。4. UGRB自相关谱的最佳拟合表明其平均偏置与点源相似，但无法排除z>2的高红移贡献。
AI.conclusion: UGRB的部分成分可能来自银河系残余发射，也有可能是高红移（z>2）的伽马射线源贡献。未来通过与更高红移示踪物（如CMB透镜）的交叉相关，可以有效区分这些成分。

recommendation.reason: 该论文主要研究伽马射线背景与大规模结构的交叉相关，与用户Zotero画像中的核心主题（暗物质、强引力透镜、JWST、尘埃、恒星形成星系等）重叠极少。虽然提及了'lensing'，但指的是宇宙大尺度结构的弱引力透镜，而非用户重点关注的强引力透镜。论文作者与用户核心作者列表无重合。因此相关性很低。
recommendation.topic_fit: 低。用户核心主题为暗物质、强引力透镜、JWST、尘埃、恒星形成星系等，而本文主题为伽马射线背景与大规模结构交叉相关，仅'lensing'一词有泛泛关联。
recommendation.method_fit: 低。本文方法为层析交叉相关分析，与用户常用的强引力透镜建模、ALMA/JWST观测等方法不同。
recommendation.author_fit: 无。论文作者与用户核心作者列表无任何重合。

recommendation.negative_reason: 论文主题与用户兴趣画像严重偏离，核心关键词和作者均不匹配。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们利用Fermi-LAT观测到的伽马射线天空与DESI和unWISE巡天提供的大尺度结构图的交叉相关，研究了河外伽马射线发射的起源。层析交叉相关揭示了伽马射线源的偏置加权红移分布。我们首先通过将探测到的伽马射线点源与大尺度结构进行交叉相关来演示该方法。我们发现了显著的交叉相关，并推断出点源的红移分布与文献中先前报告的光学对应体的分布大致一致，并且与宿主明亮活动星系核的大质量星系具有相似的线性偏置（b ≈ 2）。然后，我们研究了Fermi未分辨伽马射线背景（UGRB）的成团性，包括自相关和与大尺度结构的交叉相关。我们总共以约10σ的显著性探测到了UGRB与LSS的交叉相关，其中来自DESI和unWISE的探测均高度显著。我们的测量表明，UGRB的红移分布与探测到的点源的红移分布大致一致。此外，我们发现z < 2时与大尺度结构的交叉相关振幅相对较弱，表明UGRB的相当一部分并非来自z < 2的大尺度结构。一个自然的候选者是来自银河系残余发射的污染，而我们根据UGRB自谱得出的污染水平最佳估计表明，UGRB源的平均偏置确实与探测到的Fermi点源的偏置非常相似。然而，我们不能排除来自高红移（z > 2）伽马射线源的额外发射，我们建议与z > 2的示踪物（包括CMB透镜）进行交叉相关将是确定z > 2发射比例的理想方法。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，UGRB的部分成分可能来自银河系残余发射，也有可能是高红移（z>2）的伽马射线源贡献。未来通过与更高红移示踪物（如CMB透镜）的交叉相关，可以有效区分这些成分。

title: The Rapid ASKAP Continuum Survey (RACS) VIII: total intensity and circular polarization images and catalogues at 887.5 MHz from RACS-low2
comment: 31 pages, 41 figures, catalogues and images available at https://doi.org/10.25919/m8t2-b486, accepted in PASA
summary: We present a new data release from the Rapid ASKAP Continuum Survey (RACS), a widefield snapshot radio survey conducted with the Australian SKA Pathfinder (ASKAP). This data release contains the second RACS epoch to make use of ASKAP's low-frequency band, centred on 887.5 MHz with a bandwidth of 288 MHz, referred to as RACS-low2. This RACS-low2 data release includes both Stokes I and V imaging and catalogue data products covering the whole sky up to a declination of ~+48 degrees. RACS-low2 largely follows the observation footprint of the first low-band epoch, though includes additional coverage in the Northern Hemisphere. The observation scheduling and data processing follow previous RACS epochs, making use of autonomous scheduling and holography-derived primary beam models. The Stokes I and V catalogues are derived from images with a median point-spread function (PSF) of 14.2" times 11.8", and have median root-mean-square noise properties of 195 and 163 micro-Jy/PSF, for the Stokes I and V images, respectively. The consolidated Stokes I catalogue contains 3922151 sources. We also constructed a catalogue of Stokes V sources by measuring Stokes V images at the Stokes I source positions. For the 221 Stokes V measurements above the estimated leakage and detection thresholds we provide likely identifications, including detections of 61 radio stars, 85 pulsars, 43 AGN (many likely to be residual leakage), and one source that is not associated with a known astronomical object. These data products, including calibrated visibilities, images, source lists, and consolidated catalogues, are made publicly available through the CSIRO ASKAP Science Data Archive (CASDA).

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了RACS-low2数据发布，包含887.5 MHz频段的Stokes I和V全天空成像与星表，覆盖至赤纬+48度，提供了约392万源的总强度星表及221个偏振源识别结果。
AI.motivation: 提供第二个低波段RACS观测数据，拓展北天覆盖，并首次发布Stokes V数据产品，以支持射电连续谱巡天的科学应用。
AI.method: 使用ASKAP望远镜进行887.5 MHz中心频率、288 MHz带宽的宽场快照巡天，采用自主调度和全息导出主波束模型进行数据处理，从Stokes I和V图像中提取源并构建星表。
AI.result: Stokes I星表包含3,922,151个源，中位PSF为14.2"×11.8"，中位噪声195 μJy/PSF；Stokes V星表包含221个高于泄漏和检测阈值的测量结果，识别出61颗射电星、85颗脉冲星、43个AGN及1个未知天体。
AI.conclusion: 数据产品（包括校准可见度、图像、源列表和综合星表）已通过CASDA公开释放，为射电天文学研究提供重要数据资源。

recommendation.method_fit: 低：论文使用ASKAP射电望远镜进行巡天成像，用户库中主要使用JWST、ALMA等设备研究引力透镜和星系，方法学上无直接关联。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们发布了快速ASKAP连续巡天（RACS）的新数据，这是一项使用澳大利亚SKA探路者（ASKAP）进行的宽场快照射电巡天。本次数据发布包含RACS的第二个使用ASKAP低频波段（中心频率887.5 MHz，带宽288 MHz）的观测期，称为RACS-low2。该数据发布包括覆盖整个天球至赤纬约+48度的Stokes I和V成像及星表数据产品。RACS-low2的观测足迹与第一个低频波段观测期基本一致，但增加了北半球的覆盖。观测调度和数据处理遵循之前的RACS观测期，采用自主调度和全息术导出的主波束模型。Stokes I和V星表源自中值点扩散函数（PSF）为14.2角秒×11.8角秒的图像，Stokes I和V图像的中值均方根噪声分别为195和163微央/PSF。合并的Stokes I星表包含3,922,151个源。我们还通过在Stokes I源位置测量Stokes V图像构建了Stokes V源星表。对于超过估计泄漏和探测阈值的221个Stokes V测量值，我们提供了可能的识别，包括61颗射电星、85颗脉冲星、43个活动星系核（许多可能是残余泄漏）以及一个与已知天体无关的源。这些数据产品，包括校准可见度、图像、源列表和合并星表，已通过CSIRO ASKAP科学数据档案（CASDA）公开发布。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，数据产品（包括校准可见度、图像、源列表和综合星表）已通过CASDA公开释放，为射电天文学研究提供重要数据资源。

title: PEARLS: NuSTAR and XMM-Newton Extragalactic Survey of the JWST North Ecliptic Pole Time Domain Field VI: Multiwavelength SED Analysis
comment: 27 pages, 15 figures, 3 tables
summary: We model spectral energy distributions of 261 X-ray sources to $z \sim 5$ in the North Ecliptic Pole Time Domain Field, extending prior XMM-Newton and NuSTAR analyses. Using the star-forming main sequence (SFMS) and black hole accretion rate (BHAR) frameworks, we find that SFRs generally lie below the SFMS while most BHARs exceed the population average, as expected for X-ray-selected samples. There is a strong correlation ($ρ=+0.73$) between SFR relative to the SFMS and specific AGN luminosity, $L_{AGN}/M_*$; galaxies with the highest $L_{AGN}/M_*$ exist at or above the SFMS. X-ray luminosity correlates with SFR ($ρ=+0.80$), revealing a star-forming and X-ray luminous "cold quasar" population consistent with dramatic, short-timescale accretion episodes. Low-mass galaxies show BHARs well above the population averaged value for their mass whereas high-mass galaxies' SMBHs accrete at the population averaged BHAR, suggesting "growth spurt" and "maintenance-mode" accretion, respectively. Traditional AGN classifications (obscured, unobscured, or radio-loud) do not reveal these distinctions, demonstrating the X-ray perspective's unique ability to identify rare AGN phases that are critical for the instantaneous link between galaxies and their SMBHs.

AI.tldr: 基于261个X射线源的多波段能谱分析，发现星系恒星形成率普遍低于主序，而黑洞吸积率高于平均值；X射线光度与恒星形成率强相关，揭示“冷类星体”群体；低质量星系经历黑洞“生长爆发”，高质量星系则为“维持模式”吸积。
AI.motivation: 探究X射线选样本中星系与其中心超大质量黑洞之间的瞬时联系机制，尤其是不同质量星系中黑洞吸积模式的差异。
AI.method: 对261个X射线源（红移至z~5）进行能谱分布建模，结合星暴主序和黑洞吸积率框架，分析相对SFR与比AGN光度的相关性。
AI.result: SFR与SFMS相比普遍偏低，BHAR高于种群平均值；相对SFR与$L_{AGN}/M_*$强相关（ρ=+0.73）；X射线光度与SFR强相关（ρ=+0.80）；低质量星系BHAR远超平均值，高质量星系接近平均值。
AI.conclusion: X射线视角能唯一识别出罕见的AGN演化阶段（冷类星体、生长爆发、维持模式），这些阶段对理解星系与SMBH的瞬时耦合至关重要，且传统AGN分类无法揭示这些区别。

recommendation.reason: 论文主题为X射线源的多波段SED分析，聚焦于AGN与星系共演化，与用户Zotero库中强引力透镜、暗物质、尘埃、星际介质等核心主题仅有非常间接的关联。虽然涉及JWST，但仅作为观测场地的背景，并非论文核心。作者列表中仅Anton M. Koekemoer与用户库中作者有重叠，但权重较低。整体科学问题、方法和数据均与用户主要兴趣方向偏离较大。
recommendation.topic_fit: 低。用户库核心主题为强引力透镜、暗物质、尘埃、星际介质、恒星形成星系等，而本文主题为X射线源（AGN）的能谱分析，仅JWST一词有弱关联。
recommendation.method_fit: 低。本文方法为多波段SED拟合和相关性分析，用户库中常见方法为强透镜建模、ALMA/JWST成像、尘埃辐射模型等，方法学上无直接重叠。
recommendation.author_fit: 低。仅Anton M. Koekemoer出现在用户库作者列表中，但权重不高（5次出现），且非核心作者。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 低。本文的冷类星体、生长爆发/维持模式等概念与用户库中强透镜、暗物质、尘埃物理等方向无直接关联。
recommendation.negative_reason: 论文主题与用户Zotero库核心兴趣（强引力透镜、暗物质、尘埃、星际介质、恒星形成星系）不匹配；方法、数据、核心作者均无显著重叠。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们对北黄极时域场中261个X射线源（红移z~5）的谱能量分布进行了建模，扩展了先前的XMM-Newton和NuSTAR分析。利用恒星形成主序（SFMS）和黑洞吸积率（BHAR）框架，我们发现恒星形成率（SFR）普遍低于SFMS，而大多数BHAR超过种群平均值，这符合X射线选择样本的预期。SFR相对于SFMS的偏离与特定AGN光度（L_AGN/M_*）之间存在强相关性（ρ=+0.73）；具有最高L_AGN/M_*的星系位于SFMS之上或与之持平。X射线光度与SFR相关（ρ=+0.80），揭示了一个恒星形成且X射线明亮的“冷类星体”种群，与剧烈、短时标的吸积事件一致。低质量星系的BHAR远高于其质量对应的种群平均值，而高质量星系的超大质量黑洞（SMBH）以种群平均BHAR吸积，分别表明“生长爆发”和“维持模式”吸积。传统的AGN分类（遮蔽、未遮蔽或射电噪）无法揭示这些区别，展示了X射线视角在识别罕见AGN阶段方面的独特能力，这些阶段对理解星系与其SMBH之间的瞬时联系至关重要。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，X射线视角能唯一识别出罕见的AGN演化阶段（冷类星体、生长爆发、维持模式），这些阶段对理解星系与SMBH的瞬时耦合至关重要，且传统AGN分类无法揭示这些区别。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Survey footprints from the various observations in the NEP TDF from Silver et al. ( 2026 , their Fig. 13) . title: The Edge-on Galaxies in the DESI survey (EGIDE): sample building and photometry
comment: Accepted to the special issue "Unveiling the Structural Properties of Galaxies Using Contemporary Wide-Field Surveys" in MDPI Galaxies. Comments are welcome
summary: We present the EGIDE (The Edge-on Galaxies in the DESI survey) project - a catalogue of 149,215 edge-on galaxy candidates created using the data of the DESI Legacy Imaging Survey DR10 images. The catalogue size is ten times bigger than its predecessor and covers more than half of the sky. It is constructed in an automatic way utilizing the full power of manual annotations from the GalaxyZoo volunteers, implemented in the Zoobot neural model, which was fine-tuned to search for edge-on galaxies specifically. To ensure the credibility of the dataset, subsequent manual supervision was done. The EGIDE catalogue provides homogeneous SExtractor photometry in $griz$ bands, total stellar mass estimation, redshift values for 98% of the sample, star formation rates and other information. All of this is publicly available at The Edge-on Galaxy Database site. The preliminary analysis focused on differences between edge-on galaxies in the so-called blue sequence and red cloud populations. These galaxies demonstrate distinct properties: the number of redder galaxies drops with increasing $a/b$ ratio faster than for the bluer galaxies; galaxy thickness varies with galaxy colour: red sequence galaxies are thicker than blue cloud galaxies; the flattening ratio $q=b/a$ increases with total stellar mass $M_{\star}$ significantly only for redder cloud galaxies. It is an intriguing result, that the same trend of $q$ increasing for the high-mass end is detected from both the statistical models of figures of revolution and direct observations of edge-on galaxies in EGIDE independently. The full extent of the validity of this relationship can only be determined after correctly accounting for the contributions of the bulge and the PSF.

AI.tldr: EGIDE项目利用DESI Legacy Imaging Survey DR10影像和Zoobot神经网络模型，构建了一个包含149,215个侧向星系候选体的目录，规模是前身的10倍，覆盖超过半个天空，并提供了均匀测光、恒星质量、红移等公开数据。
AI.motivation: 现有侧向星系目录规模有限，亟需一个更大、更均匀的样本来研究侧向星系的物理性质及其在不同颜色族群（蓝序与红云）中的差异。
AI.method: 利用DESI Legacy Imaging Survey DR10影像，基于GalaxyZoo志愿者标注数据训练Zoobot神经网络模型，微调后自动识别侧向星系候选体，再辅以人工监督验证。使用SExtractor进行均匀测光，并估计恒星质量、红移和恒星形成率等参数。
AI.result: 构建了包含149,215个侧向星系候选体的目录（规模是前身的10倍，覆盖超过半个天空），98%样本有红移信息。发现红云星系数量随轴比a/b下降速度快于蓝序星系；红序星系厚度大于蓝云星系；扁平比q随恒星质量增加的趋势仅在红云星系中显著，且与理论模型独立吻合。
AI.conclusion: EGIDE目录为侧向星系研究提供了大规模、均匀的数据基础。初步分析揭示了蓝序与红云星系在厚度、扁平比等性质上的差异，其中q随质量增加的趋势得到理论与观测的独立验证，但需进一步考虑核球和PSF贡献以确认其有效性。

recommendation.reason: 论文主题为侧向星系目录构建与测光，与用户Zotero画像中的暗物质、强引力透镜、JWST、尘埃、星际介质等核心主题无直接关联。用户画像强调引力透镜、高红移星系、磁场等，而本文聚焦于近邻侧向星系的光学性质，科学问题和方法均不匹配。作者列表中无用户核心作者。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们介绍了EGIDE（DESI巡天中的侧向星系）项目——一个利用DESI Legacy成像巡天DR10图像数据创建的包含149,215个侧向星系候选体的星表。该星表规模是其前身的十倍，覆盖超过一半的天空。它采用自动化方式构建，充分利用了GalaxyZoo志愿者的手动标注，这些标注被整合到Zoobot神经模型中，该模型经过微调专门用于搜索侧向星系。为确保数据集的可靠性，后续进行了人工监督。EGIDE星表提供了在griz波段均匀的SExtractor测光数据、总恒星质量估计、98%样本的红移值、恒星形成率及其他信息。所有这些数据均可通过侧向星系数据库网站公开获取。初步分析聚焦于所谓的蓝序和红云星系群中侧向星系之间的差异。这些星系表现出不同的性质：红色星系的数量随a/b比增加而下降的速度快于蓝色星系；星系厚度随星系颜色变化：红序星系比蓝云星系更厚；扁平比q=b/a仅对较红的云星系随总恒星质量M⋆显著增加。这是一个有趣的结果，即从旋转体统计模型和EGIDE中侧向星系的直接观测中独立检测到高质量端q增加的相同趋势。这一关系的全部有效性只有在正确考虑核球和PSF的贡献后才能确定。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，EGIDE目录为侧向星系研究提供了大规模、均匀的数据基础。初步分析揭示了蓝序与红云星系在厚度、扁平比等性质上的差异，其中q随质量增加的趋势得到理论与观测的独立验证，但需进一步考虑核球和PSF贡献以确认其有效性。

title: A First Post-Friedmann Extension of the Schrödinger Approach to Cosmic Structure Formation
comment: 24 pages, no figures. Comments welcome
summary: We extend the Schrödinger approach to large-scale structure formation beyond the Newtonian regime by working at first post-Friedmann (1PF) order. The standard Schrödinger--Poisson system gives a useful reformulation of the dynamics of a self-gravitating pressureless fluid, but it corresponds to the leading post-Friedmann, or Newtonian, limit. It therefore misses the relativistic corrections that enter at next-to-leading order and become relevant on horizon scales and for high-precision cosmological surveys. Starting from the 1PF continuity and Euler equations in a flat $Λ$CDM background, we identify the conserved density variable associated with covariant mass conservation. In terms of this variable, the continuity equation takes a Newtonian-like conservative form. However, even for vanishing covariant vorticity, the spatial velocity field in the cosmological frame contains a transverse 1PF component. Thus the full 1PF mass flux cannot be represented solely by the gradient of a scalar phase. We show that the Schrödinger-like formulation at 1PF order requires an effective vector potential fixed by this transverse velocity component. This vector potential contains the post-Friedmann metric vector perturbation, related to relativistic frame-dragging effects, together with nonlinear scalar terms required by the zero-vorticity condition. Equivalently, when the equation is written in scalar form, these corrections appear as an imaginary contribution to the effective potential. At leading order our system reduces to the usual Schrödinger--Poisson formulation, while at 1PF order it provides a relativistic extension of the Schrödinger description of cold matter dynamics.

AI.tldr: 本文将薛定谔方法拓展至后牛顿（1PF）阶，用于描述大尺度结构形成，发现需要引入矢量势来包含相对论框架拖曳效应和非线性标量修正，并指出这些修正表现为有效势的虚部。
AI.motivation: 标准薛定谔-泊松系统仅对应牛顿极限，忽略了地平尺度及高精度巡天所需的相对论修正，因此需要将薛定谔方法推广至1PF阶。
AI.method: 在平坦ΛCDM背景的1PF连续性和欧拉方程基础上，识别守恒密度变量，分析速度场的横向分量，进而引入有效矢量势构建薛定谔类表述。
AI.result: 1PF阶的质量流无法仅用标量相位梯度表示，需要矢量势；该矢量势包含后弗里德曼度规矢量扰动（相对论框架拖曳）及非线性标量项；在标量形式中这些修正表现为有效势的虚部。
AI.conclusion: 该工作提供了冷暗物质动力学在薛定谔表述下的相对论扩展，低阶退化为标准薛定谔-泊松系统。

recommendation.reason: 该论文主要涉及大尺度结构形成的后弗里德曼修正和薛定谔方法，属于宇宙学理论/广义相对论范畴。用户Zotero画像高度集中于暗物质、强引力透镜、星系形成与ISM、JWST/ALMA观测等具体天体物理问题，核心作者为Treu、Dessauges-Zavadsky等观测派。论文主题、方法、数据及作者均与用户画像无直接重叠，仅暗物质一词为宽泛匹配，不足以支撑高相关性。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们将薛定谔方法扩展到牛顿机制之外的大尺度结构形成，在一阶后弗里德曼（1PF）阶次下工作。标准的薛定谔-泊松系统提供了自引力无压流体动力学的有用重构，但它对应于领先的后弗里德曼或牛顿极限。因此，它忽略了在次领先阶次进入并在视界尺度和高精度宇宙学调查中变得相关的相对论修正。从平坦ΛCDM背景下的1PF连续性和欧拉方程出发，我们识别了与协变质量守恒相关的守恒密度变量。用这个变量表示，连续性方程呈现牛顿式的保守形式。然而，即使协变涡度为零，宇宙学框架中的空间速度场也包含横向1PF分量。因此，完整的1PF质量通量不能仅由标量相位的梯度表示。我们表明，在1PF阶次下的薛定谔类表述需要一个由该横向速度分量固定的有效矢量势。该矢量势包含后弗里德曼度规矢量扰动（与相对论框架拖曳效应相关）以及由零涡度条件所需的非线性标量项。等价地，当方程以标量形式写出时，这些修正表现为有效势的虚部贡献。在领先阶次，我们的系统简化为通常的薛定谔-泊松表述，而在1PF阶次，它提供了冷物质动力学薛定谔描述的相对论扩展。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，该工作提供了冷暗物质动力学在薛定谔表述下的相对论扩展，低阶退化为标准薛定谔-泊松系统。

title: Deep Learning Segmentation of Spiral Arms and Bars for 600,000 Galaxies in DESI
comment: 12 pages, 10 Figures, Submitted to MNRAS on 12/06/26
summary: We present a catalogue of segmentation maps identifying the extent of spiral arms and bars of 639,636 galaxies in the DESI Legacy Survey. To produce these maps, we have trained a deep U-net-style neural network using the pixel masks from the Galaxy Zoo: 3D citizen science project. The resulting data products are "soft" segmentation maps, which show the confidence of the model that a pixel lies within the spiral arms or bars of a galaxy. In this paper we detail the sample selection from DESI-LS using the machine classifications from Galaxy Zoo: DESI, the architecture of the U-net model--dubbed ZooBot:3D. We demonstrate the ability of the model to identify spiral arms and bars in a wide range of face-on disks, and identify an emergent ability to identify rings--despite only a small number of ring-type galaxies being present in the training data. Finally, we discuss the practical application of these data products to photometric imaging and IFU spectroscopy. The ZooBot:3D dataset is available for use publicly, and contains the full catalogue presented in this paper, along with cross-matched subsamples for the MaNGA and SAMI IFU surveys.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为ZooBot:3D的深度学习模型，该模型基于U-net架构，利用Galaxy Zoo:3D公民科学项目的像素标注训练，为DESI Legacy Survey中的639,636个星系生成了旋臂和棒状结构的分割图，并公开了数据集。
AI.motivation: 为大规模星系巡天数据提供自动化的旋臂和棒状结构识别工具，填补利用深度学习进行星系形态像素级分割的研究空白。
AI.method: 使用U-net风格的深度神经网络，在Galaxy Zoo:3D的像素掩码上训练，对DESI Legacy Survey中的星系样本进行软分割图预测。
AI.result: 成功生成了639,636个星系的分割图，模型能有效识别面朝上盘状星系的旋臂和棒状结构，并意外展现出识别环状结构的能力。
AI.conclusion: ZooBot:3D数据集已公开可用，包含完整目录以及与MaNGA和SAMI IFU巡天的交叉匹配子样本，可应用于光度成像和IFU光谱学等实际场景。
